availableCommands.name: debug
availableCommands.description: Enable debug logging for this session and help diagnose issues (bundled)

availableCommands.name: simplify
availableCommands.description: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found. (bundled)

availableCommands.name: batch
availableCommands.description: Research and plan a large-scale change, then execute it in parallel across 5–30 isolated worktree agents that each open a PR. (bundled)

availableCommands.name: loop
availableCommands.description: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) (bundled)

availableCommands.name: claude-api
availableCommands.description:
Build apps with the Claude API or Anthropic SDK.
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`/`claude_agent_sdk`, or user asks to use Claude API, Anthropic SDKs, or Agent SDK.
DO NOT TRIGGER when: code imports `openai`/other AI SDK, general programming, or ML/data-science tasks. (bundled)

availableCommands.name: gsd:discuss-phase
availableCommands.description: Gather phase context through adaptive questioning before planning (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:verify-work

availableCommands.name: gsd:remove-phase
availableCommands.description: Remove a future phase from roadmap and renumber subsequent phases (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:debug
availableCommands.description: Systematic debugging with persistent state across context resets (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:add-phase
availableCommands.description: Add phase to end of current milestone in roadmap (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:update
availableCommands.description: Update GSD to latest version with changelog display (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:quick
availableCommands.description: Execute a quick task with GSD guarantees (atomic commits, state tracking) but skip optional agents (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:help
availableCommands.description: Show available GSD commands and usage guide (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:cleanup
availableCommands.description: Archive accumulated phase directories from completed milestones (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:progress
availableCommands.description: Check project progress, show context, and route to next action (execute or plan) (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:health
availableCommands.description: Diagnose planning directory health and optionally repair issues (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:resume-work
availableCommands.description: Resume work from previous session with full context restoration (user)

availableCommands.description: Reapply local modifications after a GSD update (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:complete-milestone
availableCommands.description: Archive completed milestone and prepare for next version (user)

availableCommands.description: Initialize a new project with deep context gathering and PROJECT.md (user)

availableCommands.description: Create phases to close all gaps identified by milestone audit (user)

availableCommands.name: create-workflow
availableCommands.description: (kspec) Formalize repeatable patterns into trackable kspec workflows. Design steps, choose triggers, create loop variants, and integrate with skills.

availableCommands.name: help
availableCommands.description: (kspec) Get help with kspec commands and workflows

availableCommands.name: observe
availableCommands.description: (kspec) Capture and act on systemic patterns — friction, successes, questions, and ideas. The feedback loop that drives process improvement.

availableCommands.name: plan
availableCommands.description: (kspec) Translate approved plans into specs and tasks. Import structured documents or create incrementally. Plans persist as durable artifacts with audit trail.

availableCommands.name: reflect
availableCommands.description: (kspec) Structured reflection at the end of work sessions. Identifies learnings, friction points, and improvements for system evolution.

availableCommands.name: review
availableCommands.description: (kspec) Kspec-specific review gates — spec alignment, own AC coverage, trait AC coverage, and validation integration. Building block for project-specific review workflows.

availableCommands.name: task-work
availableCommands.description: (kspec) Structured task lifecycle — start, work, note, submit, complete. Fix cycle handling, scope management, loop mode for automation, and quality gates.

availableCommands.name: triage
availableCommands.description: (kspec) Triage inbox items systematically. Records decisions with audit trail, then executes actions. Supports inbox, observations, and automation eligibility triage.

availableCommands.name: triage-automation
availableCommands.description: (kspec) Assess and prepare tasks for automation eligibility. Verify spec coverage, acceptance criteria, and task readiness for automated agents.

availableCommands.name: triage-inbox
availableCommands.description: (kspec) Process inbox items using the record-act pattern. Categorize, promote to spec/task, merge duplicates, defer, or delete stale items with full audit trail.

availableCommands.name: writing-specs
availableCommands.description: (kspec) Create and maintain specification items — modules, features, requirements, acceptance criteria, and traits. The source of truth for what to build.

availableCommands.name: compact
availableCommands.description: Clear conversation history but keep a summary in context. Optional: /compact [instructions for summarization]

availableCommands.name: context
availableCommands.description: Show current context usage

availableCommands.name: heapdump
availableCommands.description: Dump the JS heap to ~/Desktop

availableCommands.name: init
availableCommands.description: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation

availableCommands.description: Get comments from a GitHub pull request

availableCommands.name: review
availableCommands.description: Review a pull request

availableCommands.name: security-review
availableCommands.description: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

```
     1→// Piper TTS - speech synthesis with Piper
     2→
     3→import { app } from 'electron'
     4→import * as fs from 'fs'
     5→import * as path from 'path'
     6→import { spawn, ChildProcess } from 'child_process'
     7→
     8→import { isWindows } from '../platform.js'
     9→import { piperDir, piperVoicesDir, PIPER_BINARY_URLS } from './paths.js'
    10→import { downloadFile, extractArchive, ensureDir } from './download.js'
    11→import { logTTS } from './debug.js'
    12→import { getAnyVoicePath, getInstalledPiperVoices, getInstalledVoices } from './voice-discovery.js'
    13→import { PIPER_VOICES, type PiperVoiceName, type ProgressCallback, type TTSStatus } from './types.js'
    14→
    15→let speakingProcess: ChildProcess | null = null
    16→
    17→export function getPiperBinaryPath(): string | null {
    18→  const binaryName = isWindows ? 'piper.exe' : 'piper'
    19→  // Piper extracts to a 'piper' subdirectory
    20→  const binaryPath = path.join(piperDir, 'piper', binaryName)
    21→  if (fs.existsSync(binaryPath)) return binaryPath
    22→  // Also check direct path
    23→  const directPath = path.join(piperDir, binaryName)
    24→  if (fs.existsSync(directPath)) return directPath
    25→  // Also check system PATH (e.g., /usr/bin/piper from package manager)
    26→  if (!isWindows) {
    27→    const systemPaths = ['/usr/bin/piper', '/usr/local/bin/piper']
    28→    for (const sysPath of systemPaths) {
    29→      if (fs.existsSync(sysPath)) return sysPath
    30→    }
    31→  }
    32→  return null
    33→}
    34→
    35→export function isPiperInstalled(): boolean {
    36→  return getPiperBinaryPath() !== null
    37→}
    38→
    39→export async function checkTTS(currentVoice: string): Promise<TTSStatus> {
    40→  const piperInstalled = isPiperInstalled()
    41→  const voices = getInstalledPiperVoices()
    42→
    43→  return {
    44→    installed: piperInstalled && voices.length > 0,
    45→    engine: piperInstalled ? 'piper' : null,
    46→    voices,
    47→    currentVoice: voices.includes(currentVoice) ? currentVoice : voices[0] || null
    48→  }
    49→}
    50→
    51→export async function installPiper(
    52→  onProgress?: ProgressCallback
    53→): Promise<{ success: boolean; error?: string }> {
    54→  try {
    55→    ensureDir(piperDir)
    56→
    57→    const platform = process.platform as 'win32' | 'darwin' | 'linux'
    58→    const url = PIPER_BINARY_URLS[platform]
    59→    if (!url) {
    60→      return { success: false, error: `Unsupported platform: ${platform}` }
    61→    }
    62→
    63→    const ext = isWindows ? '.zip' : '.tar.gz'
    64→    const archivePath = path.join(piperDir, `piper${ext}`)
    65→
    66→    onProgress?.('Downloading Piper TTS...', 0)
    67→    await downloadFile(url, archivePath, (percent) => {
    68→      onProgress?.('Downloading Piper TTS...', percent)
    69→    })
    70→
    71→    onProgress?.('Extracting Piper TTS...', undefined)
    72→    await extractArchive(archivePath, piperDir)
    73→
    74→    // Cleanup archive
    75→    fs.unlinkSync(archivePath)
    76→
    77→    // Make binary executable on Unix
    78→    if (!isWindows) {
    79→      const binaryPath = getPiperBinaryPath()
    80→      if (binaryPath) {
    81→        fs.chmodSync(binaryPath, 0o755)
    82→      }
    83→    }
    84→
    85→    if (!isPiperInstalled()) {
    86→      return { success: false, error: 'Piper extraction failed' }
    87→    }
    88→
    89→    onProgress?.('Piper TTS installed successfully', 100)
    90→    return { success: true }
    91→  } catch (e: any) {
    92→    return { success: false, error: e.message }
    93→  }
    94→}
    95→
    96→export async function downloadPiperVoice(
    97→  voice: PiperVoiceName,
    98→  onProgress?: ProgressCallback
    99→): Promise<{ success: boolean; error?: string }> {
   100→  try {
   101→    ensureDir(piperVoicesDir)
   102→
   103→    const voiceInfo = PIPER_VOICES[voice]
   104→    const modelPath = path.join(piperVoicesDir, voiceInfo.file)
   105→    const configPath = path.join(piperVoicesDir, voiceInfo.config)
   106→
   107→    onProgress?.(`Downloading voice: ${voiceInfo.description}...`, 0)
   108→
   109→    // Download model file
   110→    await downloadFile(voiceInfo.url, modelPath, (percent) => {
   111→      onProgress?.('Downloading voice model...', Math.round(percent * 0.9))
   112→    })
   113→
   114→    // Download config file
   115→    await downloadFile(voiceInfo.configUrl, configPath, () => {
   116→      onProgress?.('Downloading voice config...', 95)
   117→    })
   118→
   119→    onProgress?.('Voice installed successfully', 100)
   120→    return { success: true }
   121→  } catch (e: any) {
   122→    return { success: false, error: e.message }
   123→  }
   124→}
   125→
   126→export async function speak(
   127→  text: string,
   128→  currentVoice: string,
   129→  ttsSpeed: number
   130→): Promise<{ success: boolean; audioData?: string; error?: string }> {
   131→  logTTS('piper speak() called', {
   132→    textLength: text.length,
   133→    text: text.substring(0, 200) + (text.length > 200 ? '...' : ''),
   134→    voice: currentVoice,
   135→    speed: ttsSpeed
   136→  })
   137→
   138→  const piperPath = getPiperBinaryPath()
   139→  if (!piperPath) {
   140→    logTTS('ERROR: Piper not installed')
   141→    return { success: false, error: 'Piper not installed' }
   142→  }
   143→
   144→  // Use getAnyVoicePath to support built-in, downloaded, and custom voices
   145→  let voicePaths = getAnyVoicePath(currentVoice)
   146→  let voiceToUse = currentVoice
   147→
   148→  if (!voicePaths) {
   149→    // Current voice not found - try to fall back to any available voice
   150→    const availableVoices = getInstalledVoices()
   151→    for (const voice of availableVoices) {
   152→      voicePaths = getAnyVoicePath(voice.key)
   153→      if (voicePaths) {
   154→        voiceToUse = voice.key
   155→        break
   156→      }
   157→    }
   158→    if (!voicePaths) {
   159→      return { success: false, error: 'No voices installed' }
   160→    }
   161→  }
   162→
   163→  try {
   164→    const tempDir = app.getPath('temp')
   165→    const outputPath = path.join(tempDir, `tts_${Date.now()}.wav`)
   166→
   167→    // Piper takes text from stdin and outputs WAV to file
   168→    // length_scale: <1 = faster, >1 = slower. Convert from our speed (>1 = faster)
   169→    const lengthScale = 1.0 / ttsSpeed
   170→    const args = [
   171→      '--model', voicePaths.model,
   172→      '--output_file', outputPath,
   173→      '--length_scale', lengthScale.toFixed(2)
   174→    ]
   175→
   176→    logTTS('Spawning Piper', {
   177→      piperPath,
   178→      args,
   179→      lengthScale,
   180→      model: voicePaths.model,
   181→      outputPath
   182→    })
   183→
   184→    return new Promise((resolve) => {
   185→      const proc = spawn(piperPath, args)
   186→      speakingProcess = proc
   187→
   188→      let stderrOutput = ''
   189→      proc.stderr?.on('data', (data) => {
   190→        stderrOutput += data.toString()
   191→      })
   192→
   193→      logTTS('Writing text to Piper stdin', { textBytes: Buffer.byteLength(text, 'utf8') })
   194→      proc.stdin.write(text)
   195→      proc.stdin.end()
   196→
   197→      proc.on('close', (code) => {
   198→        speakingProcess = null
   199→        logTTS('Piper process closed', { code, stderrOutput: stderrOutput.substring(0, 500) })
   200→
   201→        if (code === 0 && fs.existsSync(outputPath)) {
   202→          // Read file and return as base64
   203→          const audioBuffer = fs.readFileSync(outputPath)
   204→          const audioData = audioBuffer.toString('base64')
   205→          logTTS('Audio generated successfully', {
   206→            audioSize: audioBuffer.length,
   207→            base64Length: audioData.length
   208→          })
   209→          // Clean up temp file
   210→          fs.unlinkSync(outputPath)
   211→          resolve({ success: true, audioData })
   212→        } else {
   213→          logTTS('ERROR: Piper failed', { code, stderrOutput })
   214→          resolve({ success: false, error: `Piper exited with code ${code}` })
   215→        }
   216→      })
   217→
   218→      proc.on('error', (err) => {
   219→        speakingProcess = null
   220→        logTTS('ERROR: Piper spawn error', { error: err.message })
   221→        resolve({ success: false, error: err.message })
   222→      })
   223→    })
   224→  } catch (e: any) {
   225→    return { success: false, error: e.message }
   226→  }
   227→}
   228→
   229→export function stopSpeaking(): void {
   230→  if (speakingProcess) {
   231→    speakingProcess.kill()
   232→    speakingProcess = null
   233→  }
   234→}
   235→
```

1→import React, { createContext, useEffect, useState, useMemo, useCallback } from 'react'
     2→import type { VoiceContextValue } from './types.js'
     3→import { useTTSHandlers } from './ttsHandlers.js'
     4→import { useSTTHandlers } from './sttHandlers.js'
     5→
     6→export const VoiceContext = createContext<VoiceContextValue | null>(null)
     7→
     8→export function VoiceProvider({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }): React.ReactElement {
     9→  const [settingsLoaded, setSettingsLoaded] = useState(false)
    10→
    11→  // Initialize TTS handlers
    12→  const tts = useTTSHandlers({ settingsLoaded })
    13→
    14→  // Create save function for STT handlers
    15→  const saveVoiceSetting = useCallback(async (key: string, value: boolean | number | string) => {
    16→    if (!settingsLoaded || !window.electronAPI) return
    17→    const settings = await window.electronAPI?.getSettings()
    18→    await window.electronAPI?.saveSettings({ ...settings, [key]: value })
    19→  }, [settingsLoaded])
    20→
    21→  // Initialize STT handlers
    22→  const stt = useSTTHandlers({ saveVoiceSetting })
    23→
    24→  // Load settings on mount
    25→  useEffect(() => {
    26→    if (!window.electronAPI) {
    27→      setSettingsLoaded(true)
    28→      return
    29→    }
    30→    window.electronAPI?.getSettings().then((settings) => {
    31→      if (settings.voiceOutputEnabled !== undefined) tts.setVoiceOutputEnabledState(settings.voiceOutputEnabled)
    32→      if (settings.voiceSilenceThreshold !== undefined) stt.setSilenceThresholdState(settings.voiceSilenceThreshold)
    33→      if (settings.voiceVolume !== undefined) tts.setVolumeState(settings.voiceVolume)
    34→      if (settings.voiceSpeed !== undefined) {
    35→        tts.setSpeedState(settings.voiceSpeed)
    36→        window.electronAPI?.voiceApplySettings?.({ ttsSpeed: settings.voiceSpeed })
    37→      }
    38→      if (settings.voiceSkipOnNew !== undefined) tts.setSkipOnNewState(settings.voiceSkipOnNew)
    39→      setSettingsLoaded(true)
    40→    }).catch(() => setSettingsLoaded(true))
    41→
    42→    // Load global voice settings for project override feature
    43→    window.electronAPI?.voiceGetSettings?.()?.then((voiceSettings) => {
    44→      if (voiceSettings) {
    45→        tts.refs.globalVoiceRef.current = {
    46→          voice: voiceSettings.ttsVoice || '',
    47→          engine: voiceSettings.ttsEngine || 'piper'
    48→        }
    49→      }
    50→    })?.catch(e => console.error('Failed to load global voice settings:', e))
    51→  }, [])
    52→
    53→  // Cleanup on unmount
    54→  useEffect(() => {
    55→    return () => {
    56→      // Cancel any running processQueue
    57→      tts.refs.processingGenerationRef.current++
    58→      // Unblock any hung audio promise
    59→      if (tts.refs.audioResolveRef.current) {
    60→        tts.refs.audioResolveRef.current()
    61→        tts.refs.audioResolveRef.current = null
    62→      }
    63→      // Clean up audio element and blob URL
    64→      if (tts.refs.audioRef.current) {
    65→        tts.refs.audioRef.current.pause()
    66→        tts.refs.audioRef.current = null
    67→      }
    68→      if (tts.refs.audioUrlRef.current) {
    69→        URL.revokeObjectURL(tts.refs.audioUrlRef.current)
    70→        tts.refs.audioUrlRef.current = null
    71→      }
    72→      if (stt.refs.silenceTimerRef.current) {
    73→        clearTimeout(stt.refs.silenceTimerRef.current)
    74→      }
    75→      if (stt.refs.whisperRef.current) {
    76→        stt.refs.whisperRef.current.destroy()
    77→        stt.refs.whisperRef.current = null
    78→      }
    79→    }
    80→  }, [])
    81→
    82→  const value = useMemo((): VoiceContextValue => ({
    83→    // Voice Output
    84→    voiceOutputEnabled: tts.voiceOutputEnabled,
    85→    setVoiceOutputEnabled: tts.setVoiceOutputEnabled,
    86→    speakText: tts.speakText,
    87→    stopSpeaking: tts.stopSpeaking,
    88→    isSpeaking: tts.isSpeaking,
    89→    volume: tts.volume,
    90→    setVolume: tts.setVolume,
    91→    speed: tts.speed,
    92→    setSpeed: tts.setSpeed,
    93→    skipOnNew: tts.skipOnNew,
    94→    setSkipOnNew: tts.setSkipOnNew,
    95→    setProjectVoice: tts.setProjectVoice,
    96→    // Voice Input
    97→    isRecording: stt.isRecording,
    98→    isModelLoading: stt.isModelLoading,
    99→    isModelLoaded: stt.isModelLoaded,
   100→    modelLoadProgress: stt.modelLoadProgress,
   101→    modelLoadStatus: stt.modelLoadStatus,
   102→    currentTranscription: stt.currentTranscription,
   103→    whisperModel: stt.whisperModel,
   104→    setWhisperModel: stt.setWhisperModel,
   105→    audioLevel: stt.audioLevel,
   106→    silenceThreshold: stt.silenceThreshold,
   107→    setSilenceThreshold: stt.setSilenceThreshold,
   108→    startRecording: stt.startRecording,
   109→    stopRecording: stt.stopRecording
   110→  }), [
   111→    tts.voiceOutputEnabled,
   112→    tts.setVoiceOutputEnabled,
   113→    tts.speakText,
   114→    tts.stopSpeaking,
   115→    tts.isSpeaking,
   116→    tts.volume,
   117→    tts.setVolume,
   118→    tts.speed,
   119→    tts.setSpeed,
   120→    tts.skipOnNew,
   121→    tts.setSkipOnNew,
   122→    tts.setProjectVoice,
   123→    stt.isRecording,
   124→    stt.isModelLoading,
   125→    stt.isModelLoaded,
   126→    stt.modelLoadProgress,
   127→    stt.modelLoadStatus,
   128→    stt.currentTranscription,
   129→    stt.whisperModel,
   130→    stt.setWhisperModel,
   131→    stt.audioLevel,
   132→    stt.silenceThreshold,
   133→    stt.setSilenceThreshold,
   134→    stt.startRecording,
   135→    stt.stopRecording
   136→  ])
   137→
   138→  return (
   139→    <VoiceContext.Provider value={value}>
   140→      {children}
   141→    </VoiceContext.Provider>
   142→  )
   143→}

     2→import type { VoiceContextValue } from './types.js'
     3→import { useTTSHandlers } from './ttsHandlers.js'
     4→import { useSTTHandlers } from './sttHandlers.js'
     5→
     6→export const VoiceContext = createContext<VoiceContextValue | null>(null)
     7→
     8→export function VoiceProvider({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }): React.ReactElement {
     9→  const [settingsLoaded, setSettingsLoaded] = useState(false)
    10→
    11→  // Initialize TTS handlers
    12→  const tts = useTTSHandlers({ settingsLoaded })
    13→
    14→  // Create save function for STT handlers
    15→  const saveVoiceSetting = useCallback(async (key: string, value: boolean | number | string) => {
    16→    if (!settingsLoaded || !window.electronAPI) return
    17→    const settings = await window.electronAPI?.getSettings()
    18→    await window.electronAPI?.saveSettings({ ...settings, [key]: value })
    19→  }, [settingsLoaded])
    20→
    21→  // Initialize STT handlers
    22→  const stt = useSTTHandlers({ saveVoiceSetting })
    23→
    24→  // Load settings on mount
    25→  useEffect(() => {

    27→      setSettingsLoaded(true)
    28→      return
    29→    }
    30→    window.electronAPI?.getSettings().then((settings) => {
    31→      if (settings.voiceOutputEnabled !== undefined) tts.setVoiceOutputEnabledState(settings.voiceOutputEnabled)
    32→      if (settings.voiceSilenceThreshold !== undefined) stt.setSilenceThresholdState(settings.voiceSilenceThreshold)
    33→      if (settings.voiceVolume !== undefined) tts.setVolumeState(settings.voiceVolume)
    34→      if (settings.voiceSpeed !== undefined) {
    35→        tts.setSpeedState(settings.voiceSpeed)
    36→        window.electronAPI?.voiceApplySettings?.({ ttsSpeed: settings.voiceSpeed })
    37→      }
    38→      if (settings.voiceSkipOnNew !== undefined) tts.setSkipOnNewState(settings.voiceSkipOnNew)
    39→      setSettingsLoaded(true)
    40→    }).catch(() => setSettingsLoaded(true))
    41→
    42→    // Load global voice settings for project override feature
    43→    window.electronAPI?.voiceGetSettings?.()?.then((voiceSettings) => {
    44→      if (voiceSettings) {
    45→        tts.refs.globalVoiceRef.current = {
    46→          voice: voiceSettings.ttsVoice || '',
    47→          engine: voiceSettings.ttsEngine || 'piper'
    48→        }
    49→      }
    50→    })?.catch(e => console.error('Failed to load global voice settings:', e))
    51→  }, [])
    52→
    53→  // Cleanup on unmount
    54→  useEffect(() => {
    55→    return () => {
    56→      // Cancel any running processQueue
    57→      tts.refs.processingGenerationRef.current++
    58→      // Unblock any hung audio promise
    59→      if (tts.refs.audioResolveRef.current) {
    60→        tts.refs.audioResolveRef.current()
    61→        tts.refs.audioResolveRef.current = null
    62→      }
    63→      // Clean up audio element and blob URL
    64→      if (tts.refs.audioRef.current) {
    65→        tts.refs.audioRef.current.pause()
    66→        tts.refs.audioRef.current = null
    67→      }
    68→      if (tts.refs.audioUrlRef.current) {
    69→        URL.revokeObjectURL(tts.refs.audioUrlRef.current)
    70→        tts.refs.audioUrlRef.current = null
    71→      }
    72→      if (stt.refs.silenceTimerRef.current) {
    73→        clearTimeout(stt.refs.silenceTimerRef.current)
    74→      }
    75→      if (stt.refs.whisperRef.current) {
    76→        stt.refs.whisperRef.current.destroy()
    77→        stt.refs.whisperRef.current = null
    78→      }
    79→    }
    80→  }, [])
    81→
    82→  const value = useMemo((): VoiceContextValue => ({
    83→    // Voice Output
    84→    voiceOutputEnabled: tts.voiceOutputEnabled,
    85→    setVoiceOutputEnabled: tts.setVoiceOutputEnabled,
    86→    speakText: tts.speakText,
    87→    stopSpeaking: tts.stopSpeaking,
    88→    isSpeaking: tts.isSpeaking,
    89→    volume: tts.volume,
    90→    setVolume: tts.setVolume,
    91→    speed: tts.speed,
    92→    setSpeed: tts.setSpeed,
    93→    skipOnNew: tts.skipOnNew,
    94→    setSkipOnNew: tts.setSkipOnNew,
    95→    setProjectVoice: tts.setProjectVoice,
    96→    // Voice Input
    97→    isRecording: stt.isRecording,
    98→    isModelLoading: stt.isModelLoading,
    99→    isModelLoaded: stt.isModelLoaded,
   100→    modelLoadProgress: stt.modelLoadProgress,
   101→    modelLoadStatus: stt.modelLoadStatus,
   102→    currentTranscription: stt.currentTranscription,
   103→    whisperModel: stt.whisperModel,
   104→    setWhisperModel: stt.setWhisperModel,
   105→    audioLevel: stt.audioLevel,
   106→    silenceThreshold: stt.silenceThreshold,
   107→    setSilenceThreshold: stt.setSilenceThreshold,
   108→    startRecording: stt.startRecording,
   109→    stopRecording: stt.stopRecording
   110→  }), [
   111→    tts.voiceOutputEnabled,
   112→    tts.setVoiceOutputEnabled,
   113→    tts.speakText,
   114→    tts.stopSpeaking,
   115→    tts.isSpeaking,
   116→    tts.volume,
   117→    tts.setVolume,
   118→    tts.speed,
   119→    tts.setSpeed,
   120→    tts.skipOnNew,
   121→    tts.setSkipOnNew,
   122→    tts.setProjectVoice,
   123→    stt.isRecording,
   124→    stt.isModelLoading,
   125→    stt.isModelLoaded,
   126→    stt.modelLoadProgress,
   127→    stt.modelLoadStatus,
   128→    stt.currentTranscription,
   129→    stt.whisperModel,
   130→    stt.setWhisperModel,
   131→    stt.audioLevel,
   132→    stt.silenceThreshold,
   133→    stt.setSilenceThreshold,
   134→    stt.startRecording,
   135→    stt.stopRecording
   136→  ])
   137→
   138→  return (
   139→    <VoiceContext.Provider value={value}>
   140→      {children}
   141→    </VoiceContext.Provider>
   142→  )
   143→}
   144→

1→import { useCallback, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     2→import type { WhisperModelSize, WhisperInstance, WhisperTranscriberConfig, STTRefs } from './types.js'
     3→import { WHISPER_MODEL_URLS, WHISPER_MODEL_SIZES } from './constants.js'
     4→
     5→// Dynamic import for whisper-web-transcriber - only loaded when voice input is actually used
     6→// This saves ~4.5MB bundle size when voice features are disabled
     7→let WhisperTranscriberClass: (new (config: WhisperTranscriberConfig) => WhisperInstance) | null = null
     8→
     9→async function loadWhisperTranscriber(): Promise<new (config: WhisperTranscriberConfig) => WhisperInstance> {
    10→  if (!WhisperTranscriberClass) {
    11→    const module = await import('whisper-web-transcriber')
    12→    WhisperTranscriberClass = module.WhisperTranscriber as new (config: WhisperTranscriberConfig) => WhisperInstance
    13→  }
    14→  return WhisperTranscriberClass
    15→}
    16→
    17→export interface UseSTTHandlersOptions {
    18→  saveVoiceSetting: (key: string, value: boolean | number | string) => void
    19→}
    20→
    21→export interface UseSTTHandlersResult {
    22→  // State
    23→  isRecording: boolean
    24→  isModelLoading: boolean
    25→  isModelLoaded: boolean
    26→  modelLoadProgress: number
    27→  modelLoadStatus: string
    28→  currentTranscription: string
    29→  whisperModel: WhisperModelSize
    30→  audioLevel: number
    31→  silenceThreshold: number
    32→
    33→  // Actions
    34→  setWhisperModel: (model: WhisperModelSize) => void
    35→  setSilenceThreshold: (threshold: number) => void
    36→  startRecording: (onTranscription: (text: string) => void) => Promise<void>
    37→  stopRecording: () => void
    38→
    39→  // Refs for cleanup
    40→  refs: STTRefs
    41→
    42→  // State setters for settings loading
    43→  setWhisperModelState: (model: WhisperModelSize) => void
    44→  setSilenceThresholdState: (threshold: number) => void
    45→}
    46→
    47→export function useSTTHandlers({ saveVoiceSetting }: UseSTTHandlersOptions): UseSTTHandlersResult {
    48→  // Voice Input (STT) state
    49→  const [isRecording, setIsRecording] = useState(false)
    50→  const [isModelLoading, setIsModelLoading] = useState(false)
    51→  const [isModelLoaded, setIsModelLoaded] = useState(false)
    52→  const [modelLoadProgress, setModelLoadProgress] = useState(0)
    53→  const [modelLoadStatus, setModelLoadStatus] = useState('')
    54→  const [whisperModel, setWhisperModelState] = useState<WhisperModelSize>('base.en')
    55→  const [currentTranscription, setCurrentTranscription] = useState('')
    56→  const [audioLevel, setAudioLevel] = useState(0)
    57→  const [silenceThreshold, setSilenceThresholdState] = useState(5)
    58→
    59→  // Refs
    60→  const whisperRef = useRef<WhisperInstance | null>(null)
    61→  const onTranscriptionRef = useRef<((text: string) => void) | null>(null)
    62→  const finalTranscriptionRef = useRef<string>('')
    63→  const silenceTimerRef = useRef<NodeJS.Timeout | null>(null)
    64→  const isRecordingRef = useRef(false)
    65→
    66→  // Audio monitoring refs
    67→  const audioContextRef = useRef<AudioContext | null>(null)
    68→  const analyserRef = useRef<AnalyserNode | null>(null)
    69→  const audioStreamRef = useRef<MediaStream | null>(null)
    70→  const levelIntervalRef = useRef<number | null>(null)
    71→  const silenceStartRef = useRef<number | null>(null)
    72→  const silenceThresholdRef = useRef(silenceThreshold)
    73→  const speechDetectedRef = useRef(false) // true if audio went above threshold since last chunk
    74→  const processingUtteranceRef = useRef(false) // guard against re-entry during stop/submit/restart
    75→
    76→  const refs: STTRefs = {
    77→    whisperRef,
    78→    onTranscriptionRef,
    79→    finalTranscriptionRef,
    80→    silenceTimerRef,
    81→    isRecordingRef
    82→  }
    83→
    84→  // Start audio level monitoring
    85→  const startAudioMonitoring = useCallback(async () => {
    86→    try {
    87→      const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ audio: true })
    88→      audioStreamRef.current = stream
    89→      const audioCtx = new AudioContext()
    90→      audioContextRef.current = audioCtx
    91→      const source = audioCtx.createMediaStreamSource(stream)
    92→      const analyser = audioCtx.createAnalyser()
    93→      analyser.fftSize = 256
    94→      analyser.smoothingTimeConstant = 0.3
    95→      source.connect(analyser)
    96→      analyserRef.current = analyser
    97→
    98→      const dataArray = new Uint8Array(analyser.frequencyBinCount)
    99→      levelIntervalRef.current = window.setInterval(() => {
   100→        if (!analyserRef.current || !isRecordingRef.current) return
   101→        analyserRef.current.getByteFrequencyData(dataArray)
   102→        const avg = dataArray.reduce((sum, v) => sum + v, 0) / dataArray.length
   103→        const level = Math.round((avg / 255) * 100)
   104→        setAudioLevel(level)
   105→
   106→        const threshold = silenceThresholdRef.current
   107→        if (level < threshold) {
   108→          // Audio is below threshold (silence)
   109→          if (!silenceStartRef.current) {
   110→            silenceStartRef.current = Date.now()
   111→          } else if (!processingUtteranceRef.current) {
   112→            const silenceDuration = Date.now() - silenceStartRef.current
   113→            // After 2s of silence with speech detected: submit transcription,
   114→            // then stop/restart Whisper to clear the audio buffer
   115→            if (silenceDuration > 2000 && speechDetectedRef.current &&
   116→                finalTranscriptionRef.current.trim() &&
   117→                isRecordingRef.current && whisperRef.current) {
   118→              processingUtteranceRef.current = true
   119→
   120→              const callback = onTranscriptionRef.current
   121→              const textToSend = finalTranscriptionRef.current.trim()
   122→              finalTranscriptionRef.current = ''
   123→              setCurrentTranscription('')
   124→              silenceStartRef.current = null
   125→              speechDetectedRef.current = false
   126→
   127→              if (callback && textToSend) {
   128→                callback(textToSend)
   129→              }
   130→
   131→              // Stop and restart to clear Whisper's accumulated audio buffer
   132→              whisperRef.current.stopRecording()
   133→              if (isRecordingRef.current && whisperRef.current) {
   134→                whisperRef.current.startRecording().catch((error) => {
   135→                  console.error('Failed to restart recording after silence:', error)
   136→                  setIsRecording(false)
   137→                  isRecordingRef.current = false
   138→                })
   139→              }
   140→              processingUtteranceRef.current = false
   141→            }
   142→          }
   143→        } else {
   144→          // Audio is above threshold (speaking)
   145→          silenceStartRef.current = null
   146→          speechDetectedRef.current = true
   147→        }
   148→      }, 100)
   149→    } catch (error) {
   150→      console.error('Failed to start audio monitoring:', error)
   151→    }
   152→  }, [])
   153→
   154→  // Stop audio level monitoring
   155→  const stopAudioMonitoring = useCallback(() => {
   156→    if (levelIntervalRef.current !== null) {
   157→      clearInterval(levelIntervalRef.current)
   158→      levelIntervalRef.current = null
   159→    }
   160→    if (audioContextRef.current) {
   161→      audioContextRef.current.close().catch(() => {})
   162→      audioContextRef.current = null
   163→    }
   164→    if (audioStreamRef.current) {
   165→      audioStreamRef.current.getTracks().forEach(t => t.stop())
   166→      audioStreamRef.current = null
   167→    }
   168→    analyserRef.current = null
   169→    silenceStartRef.current = null
   170→    setAudioLevel(0)
   171→  }, [])
   172→
   173→  // Initialize Whisper transcriber - dynamically loads the module only when needed
   174→  const initWhisper = useCallback(async () => {
   175→    if (whisperRef.current || isModelLoading) return
   176→
   177→    setIsModelLoading(true)
   178→    setModelLoadStatus('Loading Whisper module...')
   179→
   180→    try {
   181→      const WhisperTranscriber = await loadWhisperTranscriber()
   182→
   183→      setModelLoadStatus('Initializing...')
   184→
   185→      const modelUrl = WHISPER_MODEL_URLS[whisperModel]
   186→      const modelSizeMB = WHISPER_MODEL_SIZES[whisperModel]
   187→
   188→      const transcriber = new WhisperTranscriber({
   189→        modelUrl,
   190→        modelSize: whisperModel,
   191→        audioIntervalMs: 3000, // Feed audio to Whisper every 3s for near-realtime processing
   192→        onTranscription: (text: string) => {
   193→          // Library returns CUMULATIVE transcription of all audio since startRecording()
   194→          // So we REPLACE (not append) the current transcription text
   195→          const cleaned = text.trim()
   196→            .replace(/\[BLANK_AUDIO\]/gi, '')
   197→            .replace(/\[Silence\]/gi, '')
   198→            .replace(/\(silence\)/gi, '')
   199→            .replace(/\[Pause\]/gi, '')
   200→            .replace(/\(Pause\)/gi, '')
   201→            .replace(/\[inaudible\]/gi, '')
   202→            .replace(/\[Music\]/gi, '')
   203→            .replace(/\(Music\)/gi, '')
   204→            .replace(/\[Applause\]/gi, '')
   205→            .replace(/\[Laughter\]/gi, '')
   206→            .replace(/\[.*?\]/g, '')
   207→            .replace(/\(.*?\)/g, '')
   208→            .replace(/♪.*?♪/g, '')
   209→            .replace(/\*.*?\*/g, '')
   210→            .replace(/^[\s.,!?]+$/, '')
   211→            .replace(/^\.*$/, '')
   212→            .trim()
   213→
   214→          // Skip if empty or just short punctuation/artifacts
   215→          // Also skip if no speech was detected (audio never exceeded threshold)
   216→          if (cleaned && cleaned.length > 1 && !/^[.,!?\-]+$/.test(cleaned) && speechDetectedRef.current) {
   217→            finalTranscriptionRef.current = cleaned
   218→            setCurrentTranscription(cleaned)
   219→          }
   220→        },
   221→        debug: true,
   222→        onProgress: (progress: number) => {
   223→          setModelLoadProgress(progress)
   224→          setModelLoadStatus(`Downloading ${whisperModel} (${modelSizeMB}MB)... ${progress}%`)
   225→        },
   226→        onStatus: (status: string) => {
   227→          setModelLoadStatus(status)
   228→        }
   229→      })
   230→
   231→      // Override confirm() to auto-accept the model download prompt from helpers.js
   232→      const originalConfirm = window.confirm
   233→      window.confirm = () => true
   234→      try {
   235→        await transcriber.loadModel()
   236→      } finally {
   237→        window.confirm = originalConfirm
   238→      }
   239→      whisperRef.current = transcriber
   240→      setIsModelLoaded(true)
   241→      setModelLoadStatus('Model loaded')
   242→    } catch (error: unknown) {
   243→      console.error('Failed to initialize Whisper:', error)
   244→      setModelLoadStatus(`Error: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)}`)
   245→    } finally {
   246→      setIsModelLoading(false)
   247→    }
   248→  }, [whisperModel, isModelLoading])
   249→
   250→  // Set Whisper model (saves to settings)
   251→  const setWhisperModel = useCallback((model: WhisperModelSize) => {
   252→    setWhisperModelState(model)
   253→    if (whisperRef.current) {
   254→      whisperRef.current.destroy()
   255→      whisperRef.current = null
   256→      setIsModelLoaded(false)
   257→    }
   258→    saveVoiceSetting('whisperModel', model)
   259→  }, [saveVoiceSetting])
   260→
   261→  // Set silence threshold (saves to settings)
   262→  const setSilenceThreshold = useCallback((threshold: number) => {
   263→    setSilenceThresholdState(threshold)
   264→    silenceThresholdRef.current = threshold
   265→    saveVoiceSetting('voiceSilenceThreshold', threshold)
   266→  }, [saveVoiceSetting])
   267→
   268→  // Start recording and transcribing
   269→  const startRecording = useCallback(async (onTranscription: (text: string) => void) => {
   270→    if (isRecording) return
   271→
   272→    onTranscriptionRef.current = onTranscription
   273→    finalTranscriptionRef.current = ''
   274→    setCurrentTranscription('')
   275→    silenceStartRef.current = null
   276→    speechDetectedRef.current = false
   277→
   278→    if (silenceTimerRef.current) {
   279→      clearTimeout(silenceTimerRef.current)
   280→      silenceTimerRef.current = null
   281→    }
   282→
   283→    if (!whisperRef.current) {
   284→      await initWhisper()
   285→    }
   286→
   287→    if (!whisperRef.current) {
   288→      console.error('Whisper not initialized')
   289→      return
   290→    }
   291→
   292→    try {
   293→      await whisperRef.current.startRecording()
   294→      await startAudioMonitoring()
   295→      setIsRecording(true)
   296→      isRecordingRef.current = true
   297→    } catch (error: unknown) {
   298→      console.error('Failed to start recording:', error)
   299→      const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : ''
   300→      const errorName = error instanceof Error ? error.name : ''
   301→      if (errorMessage.includes('Permission denied') || errorName === 'NotAllowedError') {
   302→        alert('Microphone access denied. Please allow microphone access in your browser/system settings.')
   303→      }
   304→    }
   305→  }, [isRecording, initWhisper, startAudioMonitoring])
   306→
   307→  // Stop recording
   308→  const stopRecording = useCallback(() => {
   309→    if (!isRecording || !whisperRef.current) return
   310→
   311→    if (silenceTimerRef.current) {
   312→      clearTimeout(silenceTimerRef.current)
   313→      silenceTimerRef.current = null
   314→    }
   315→
   316→    whisperRef.current.stopRecording()
   317→    stopAudioMonitoring()
   318→    setIsRecording(false)
   319→    isRecordingRef.current = false
   320→
   321→    if (onTranscriptionRef.current && finalTranscriptionRef.current.trim()) {
   322→      onTranscriptionRef.current(finalTranscriptionRef.current.trim())
   323→    }
   324→
   325→    onTranscriptionRef.current = null
   326→    finalTranscriptionRef.current = ''
   327→    setCurrentTranscription('')
   328→  }, [isRecording, stopAudioMonitoring])
   329→
   330→  return {
   331→    isRecording,
   332→    isModelLoading,
   333→    isModelLoaded,
   334→    modelLoadProgress,
   335→    modelLoadStatus,
   336→    currentTranscription,
   337→    whisperModel,
   338→    audioLevel,
   339→    silenceThreshold,
   340→    setWhisperModel,
   341→    setSilenceThreshold,
   342→    startRecording,
   343→    stopRecording,
   344→    refs,
   345→    setWhisperModelState,
   346→    setSilenceThresholdState
   347→  }
   348→}

    87→      const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ audio: true })
    88→      audioStreamRef.current = stream
    89→      const audioCtx = new AudioContext()
    90→      audioContextRef.current = audioCtx
    91→      const source = audioCtx.createMediaStreamSource(stream)
    92→      const analyser = audioCtx.createAnalyser()
    93→      analyser.fftSize = 256
    94→      analyser.smoothingTimeConstant = 0.3
    95→      source.connect(analyser)
    96→      analyserRef.current = analyser
    97→
    98→      const dataArray = new Uint8Array(analyser.frequencyBinCount)
    99→      levelIntervalRef.current = window.setInterval(() => {
   100→        if (!analyserRef.current || !isRecordingRef.current) return
   101→        analyserRef.current.getByteFrequencyData(dataArray)
   102→        const avg = dataArray.reduce((sum, v) => sum + v, 0) / dataArray.length
   103→        const level = Math.round((avg / 255) * 100)
   104→        setAudioLevel(level)
   105→
   106→        const threshold = silenceThresholdRef.current
   107→        if (level < threshold) {
   108→          // Audio is below threshold (silence)
   109→          if (!silenceStartRef.current) {
   110→            silenceStartRef.current = Date.now()
   111→          } else if (!processingUtteranceRef.current) {
   112→            const silenceDuration = Date.now() - silenceStartRef.current
   113→            // After 2s of silence with speech detected: submit transcription,
   114→            // then stop/restart Whisper to clear the audio buffer
   115→            if (silenceDuration > 2000 && speechDetectedRef.current &&
   116→                finalTranscriptionRef.current.trim() &&
   117→                isRecordingRef.current && whisperRef.current) {
   118→              processingUtteranceRef.current = true
   119→
   120→              const callback = onTranscriptionRef.current
   121→              const textToSend = finalTranscriptionRef.current.trim()
   122→              finalTranscriptionRef.current = ''
   123→              setCurrentTranscription('')
   124→              silenceStartRef.current = null
   125→              speechDetectedRef.current = false
   126→
   127→              if (callback && textToSend) {
   128→                callback(textToSend)
   129→              }
   130→
   131→              // Stop and restart to clear Whisper's accumulated audio buffer
   132→              whisperRef.current.stopRecording()
   133→              if (isRecordingRef.current && whisperRef.current) {
   134→                whisperRef.current.startRecording().catch((error) => {
   135→                  console.error('Failed to restart recording after silence:', error)
   136→                  setIsRecording(false)
   137→                  isRecordingRef.current = false
   138→                })
   139→              }
   140→              processingUtteranceRef.current = false
   141→            }
   142→          }
   143→        } else {
   144→          // Audio is above threshold (speaking)
   145→          silenceStartRef.current = null
   146→          speechDetectedRef.current = true
   147→        }
   148→      }, 100)
   149→    } catch (error) {
   150→      console.error('Failed to start audio monitoring:', error)
   151→    }
   152→  }, [])
   153→
   154→  // Stop audio level monitoring
   155→  const stopAudioMonitoring = useCallback(() => {
   156→    if (levelIntervalRef.current !== null) {
   157→      clearInterval(levelIntervalRef.current)
   158→      levelIntervalRef.current = null
   159→    }
   160→    if (audioContextRef.current) {
   161→      audioContextRef.current.close().catch(() => {})
   162→      audioContextRef.current = null
   163→    }
   164→    if (audioStreamRef.current) {
   165→      audioStreamRef.current.getTracks().forEach(t => t.stop())
   166→      audioStreamRef.current = null
   167→    }
   168→    analyserRef.current = null
   169→    silenceStartRef.current = null
   170→    setAudioLevel(0)
   171→  }, [])
   172→
   173→  // Initialize Whisper transcriber - dynamically loads the module only when needed
   174→  const initWhisper = useCallback(async () => {
   175→    if (whisperRef.current || isModelLoading) return
   176→
   177→    setIsModelLoading(true)
   178→    setModelLoadStatus('Loading Whisper module...')
   179→
   180→    try {
   181→      const WhisperTranscriber = await loadWhisperTranscriber()
   182→
   183→      setModelLoadStatus('Initializing...')
   184→
   185→      const modelUrl = WHISPER_MODEL_URLS[whisperModel]
   186→      const modelSizeMB = WHISPER_MODEL_SIZES[whisperModel]
   187→
   188→      const transcriber = new WhisperTranscriber({
   189→        modelUrl,
   190→        modelSize: whisperModel,
   191→        audioIntervalMs: 3000, // Feed audio to Whisper every 3s for near-realtime processing
   192→        onTranscription: (text: string) => {
   193→          // Library returns CUMULATIVE transcription of all audio since startRecording()
   194→          // So we REPLACE (not append) the current transcription text
   195→          const cleaned = text.trim()
   196→            .replace(/\[BLANK_AUDIO\]/gi, '')
   197→            .replace(/\[Silence\]/gi, '')
   198→            .replace(/\(silence\)/gi, '')
   199→            .replace(/\[Pause\]/gi, '')
   200→            .replace(/\(Pause\)/gi, '')
   201→            .replace(/\[inaudible\]/gi, '')
   202→            .replace(/\[Music\]/gi, '')
   203→            .replace(/\(Music\)/gi, '')
   204→            .replace(/\[Applause\]/gi, '')
   205→            .replace(/\[Laughter\]/gi, '')
   206→            .replace(/\[.*?\]/g, '')
   207→            .replace(/\(.*?\)/g, '')
   208→            .replace(/♪.*?♪/g, '')
   209→            .replace(/\*.*?\*/g, '')
   210→            .replace(/^[\s.,!?]+$/, '')
   211→            .replace(/^\.*$/, '')
   212→            .trim()
   213→
   214→          // Skip if empty or just short punctuation/artifacts
   215→          // Also skip if no speech was detected (audio never exceeded threshold)
   216→          if (cleaned && cleaned.length > 1 && !/^[.,!?\-]+$/.test(cleaned) && speechDetectedRef.current) {
   217→            finalTranscriptionRef.current = cleaned
   218→            setCurrentTranscription(cleaned)
   219→          }
   220→        },
   221→        debug: true,
   222→        onProgress: (progress: number) => {
   223→          setModelLoadProgress(progress)
   224→          setModelLoadStatus(`Downloading ${whisperModel} (${modelSizeMB}MB)... ${progress}%`)
   225→        },
   226→        onStatus: (status: string) => {
   227→          setModelLoadStatus(status)
   228→        }
   229→      })
   230→
   231→      // Override confirm() to auto-accept the model download prompt from helpers.js
   232→      const originalConfirm = window.confirm
   233→      window.confirm = () => true
   234→      try {
   235→        await transcriber.loadModel()
   236→      } finally {
   237→        window.confirm = originalConfirm
   238→      }
   239→      whisperRef.current = transcriber
   240→      setIsModelLoaded(true)
   241→      setModelLoadStatus('Model loaded')
   242→    } catch (error: unknown) {
   243→      console.error('Failed to initialize Whisper:', error)
   244→      setModelLoadStatus(`Error: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)}`)
   245→    } finally {
   246→      setIsModelLoading(false)
   247→    }
   248→  }, [whisperModel, isModelLoading])
   249→
   250→  // Set Whisper model (saves to settings)
   251→  const setWhisperModel = useCallback((model: WhisperModelSize) => {
   252→    setWhisperModelState(model)
   253→    if (whisperRef.current) {
   254→      whisperRef.current.destroy()
   255→      whisperRef.current = null
   256→      setIsModelLoaded(false)
   257→    }
   258→    saveVoiceSetting('whisperModel', model)
   259→  }, [saveVoiceSetting])
   260→
   261→  // Set silence threshold (saves to settings)
   262→  const setSilenceThreshold = useCallback((threshold: number) => {
   263→    setSilenceThresholdState(threshold)
   264→    silenceThresholdRef.current = threshold
   265→    saveVoiceSetting('voiceSilenceThreshold', threshold)
   266→  }, [saveVoiceSetting])
   267→
   268→  // Start recording and transcribing
   269→  const startRecording = useCallback(async (onTranscription: (text: string) => void) => {
   270→    if (isRecording) return
   271→
   272→    onTranscriptionRef.current = onTranscription
   273→    finalTranscriptionRef.current = ''
   274→    setCurrentTranscription('')
   275→    silenceStartRef.current = null
   276→    speechDetectedRef.current = false
   277→
   278→    if (silenceTimerRef.current) {
   279→      clearTimeout(silenceTimerRef.current)
   280→      silenceTimerRef.current = null
   281→    }
   282→
   283→    if (!whisperRef.current) {
   284→      await initWhisper()
   285→    }
   286→
   287→    if (!whisperRef.current) {
   288→      console.error('Whisper not initialized')
   289→      return
   290→    }
   291→
   292→    try {
   293→      await whisperRef.current.startRecording()
   294→      await startAudioMonitoring()
   295→      setIsRecording(true)
   296→      isRecordingRef.current = true
   297→    } catch (error: unknown) {
   298→      console.error('Failed to start recording:', error)
   299→      const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : ''
   300→      const errorName = error instanceof Error ? error.name : ''
   301→      if (errorMessage.includes('Permission denied') || errorName === 'NotAllowedError') {
   302→        alert('Microphone access denied. Please allow microphone access in your browser/system settings.')
   303→      }
   304→    }
   305→  }, [isRecording, initWhisper, startAudioMonitoring])
   306→
   307→  // Stop recording
   308→  const stopRecording = useCallback(() => {
   309→    if (!isRecording || !whisperRef.current) return
   310→
   311→    if (silenceTimerRef.current) {
   312→      clearTimeout(silenceTimerRef.current)
   313→      silenceTimerRef.current = null
   314→    }
   315→
   316→    whisperRef.current.stopRecording()
   317→    stopAudioMonitoring()
   318→    setIsRecording(false)
   319→    isRecordingRef.current = false
   320→
   321→    if (onTranscriptionRef.current && finalTranscriptionRef.current.trim()) {
   322→      onTranscriptionRef.current(finalTranscriptionRef.current.trim())
   323→    }
   324→
   325→    onTranscriptionRef.current = null
   326→    finalTranscriptionRef.current = ''
   327→    setCurrentTranscription('')
   328→  }, [isRecording, stopAudioMonitoring])
   329→
   330→  return {
   331→    isRecording,
   332→    isModelLoading,
   333→    isModelLoaded,
   334→    modelLoadProgress,
   335→    modelLoadStatus,
   336→    currentTranscription,
   337→    whisperModel,
   338→    audioLevel,
   339→    silenceThreshold,
   340→    setWhisperModel,
   341→    setSilenceThreshold,
   342→    startRecording,
   343→    stopRecording,
   344→    refs,
   345→    setWhisperModelState,
   346→    setSilenceThresholdState
   347→  }
   348→}
   349→

1→import { useCallback, useMemo, useRef, useEffect, useState } from 'react'
     2→import type { ProjectVoiceSettings, TTSRefs } from './types.js'
     3→
     4→export interface UseTTSHandlersOptions {
     5→  settingsLoaded: boolean
     6→}
     7→
     8→export interface UseTTSHandlersResult {
     9→  // State
    10→  voiceOutputEnabled: boolean
    11→  isSpeaking: boolean
    12→  volume: number
    13→  speed: number
    14→  skipOnNew: boolean
    15→
    16→  // Setters
    17→  setVoiceOutputEnabled: (enabled: boolean) => void
    18→  setVolume: (volume: number) => void
    19→  setSpeed: (speed: number) => void
    20→  setSkipOnNew: (skip: boolean) => void
    21→  setProjectVoice: (settings: ProjectVoiceSettings | null) => void
    22→
    23→  // Actions
    24→  speakText: (text: string) => void
    25→  stopSpeaking: () => void
    26→
    27→  // Refs for external use
    28→  refs: TTSRefs
    29→
    30→  // State setters for settings loading
    31→  setVoiceOutputEnabledState: (enabled: boolean) => void
    32→  setVolumeState: (volume: number) => void
    33→  setSpeedState: (speed: number) => void
    34→  setSkipOnNewState: (skip: boolean) => void
    35→}
    36→
    37→export function useTTSHandlers({ settingsLoaded }: UseTTSHandlersOptions): UseTTSHandlersResult {
    38→  // Voice Output (TTS) state
    39→  const [voiceOutputEnabled, setVoiceOutputEnabledState] = useState(false)
    40→  const [isSpeaking, setIsSpeaking] = useState(false)
    41→  const [volume, setVolumeState] = useState(1.0)
    42→  const [speed, setSpeedState] = useState(1.0)
    43→  const [skipOnNew, setSkipOnNewState] = useState(false)
    44→
    45→  // Refs
    46→  const audioRef = useRef<HTMLAudioElement | null>(null)
    47→  const audioUrlRef = useRef<string | null>(null)
    48→  const speakQueueRef = useRef<string[]>([])
    49→  const isProcessingRef = useRef(false)
    50→  const voiceOutputEnabledRef = useRef(voiceOutputEnabled)
    51→  const skipOnNewRef = useRef(skipOnNew)
    52→  const volumeRef = useRef(volume)
    53→  const processingGenerationRef = useRef(0)
    54→  const audioResolveRef = useRef<(() => void) | null>(null)
    55→  const projectVoiceRef = useRef<ProjectVoiceSettings | null>(null)
    56→  const globalVoiceRef = useRef<{ voice: string; engine: string } | null>(null)
    57→
    58→  const refs: TTSRefs = {
    59→    audioRef,
    60→    audioUrlRef,
    61→    speakQueueRef,
    62→    isProcessingRef,
    63→    voiceOutputEnabledRef,
    64→    skipOnNewRef,
    65→    volumeRef,
    66→    processingGenerationRef,
    67→    audioResolveRef,
    68→    projectVoiceRef,
    69→    globalVoiceRef
    70→  }
    71→
    72→  // Keep refs in sync to avoid stale closures
    73→  useEffect(() => {
    74→    voiceOutputEnabledRef.current = voiceOutputEnabled
    75→  }, [voiceOutputEnabled])
    76→
    77→  useEffect(() => {
    78→    skipOnNewRef.current = skipOnNew
    79→  }, [skipOnNew])
    80→
    81→  useEffect(() => {
    82→    volumeRef.current = volume
    83→  }, [volume])
    84→
    85→  // Save a single voice setting
    86→  const saveVoiceSetting = useCallback(async (key: string, value: boolean | number) => {
    87→    if (!settingsLoaded || !window.electronAPI) return
    88→    const settings = await window.electronAPI?.getSettings()
    89→    await window.electronAPI?.saveSettings({ ...settings, [key]: value })
    90→  }, [settingsLoaded])
    91→
    92→  // Debounced save for slider-based settings (volume, speed) to avoid excessive IPC calls
    93→  const debouncedSaveRef = useRef<{ timer: NodeJS.Timeout | null; pending: Map<string, boolean | number> }>({
    94→    timer: null,
    95→    pending: new Map()
    96→  })
    97→
    98→  const debouncedSaveVoiceSetting = useMemo(() => {
    99→    return (key: string, value: boolean | number) => {
   100→      debouncedSaveRef.current.pending.set(key, value)
   101→      if (debouncedSaveRef.current.timer) {
   102→        clearTimeout(debouncedSaveRef.current.timer)
   103→      }
   104→      debouncedSaveRef.current.timer = setTimeout(() => {
   105→        debouncedSaveRef.current.pending.forEach((val, k) => {
   106→          saveVoiceSetting(k, val)
   107→        })
   108→        debouncedSaveRef.current.pending.clear()
   109→        debouncedSaveRef.current.timer = null
   110→      }, 500)
   111→    }
   112→  }, [saveVoiceSetting])
   113→
   114→  // Wrapper for setVoiceOutputEnabled that saves setting
   115→  const setVoiceOutputEnabled = useCallback((enabled: boolean) => {
   116→    setVoiceOutputEnabledState(enabled)
   117→    saveVoiceSetting('voiceOutputEnabled', enabled)
   118→  }, [saveVoiceSetting])
   119→
   120→  // Update volume on current audio
   121→  const setVolume = useCallback((v: number) => {
   122→    const clamped = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, v))
   123→    setVolumeState(clamped)
   124→    if (audioRef.current) {
   125→      audioRef.current.volume = clamped
   126→    }
   127→    debouncedSaveVoiceSetting('voiceVolume', clamped)
   128→  }, [debouncedSaveVoiceSetting])
   129→
   130→  // Update speed and notify backend
   131→  const setSpeed = useCallback((s: number) => {
   132→    const clamped = Math.max(0.5, Math.min(2.0, s))
   133→    setSpeedState(clamped)
   134→    window.electronAPI?.voiceApplySettings?.({ ttsSpeed: clamped })
   135→    debouncedSaveVoiceSetting('voiceSpeed', clamped)
   136→  }, [debouncedSaveVoiceSetting])
   137→
   138→  // Update skipOnNew and save
   139→  const setSkipOnNew = useCallback((skip: boolean) => {
   140→    setSkipOnNewState(skip)
   141→    saveVoiceSetting('voiceSkipOnNew', skip)
   142→  }, [saveVoiceSetting])
   143→
   144→  // Set per-project voice override
   145→  const setProjectVoice = useCallback((settings: ProjectVoiceSettings | null) => {
   146→    projectVoiceRef.current = settings
   147→    if (settings?.ttsVoice && settings?.ttsEngine) {
   148→      window.electronAPI?.voiceApplySettings?.({
   149→        ttsVoice: settings.ttsVoice,
   150→        ttsEngine: settings.ttsEngine
   151→      })
   152→    } else if (globalVoiceRef.current) {
   153→      window.electronAPI?.voiceApplySettings?.({
   154→        ttsVoice: globalVoiceRef.current.voice,
   155→        ttsEngine: globalVoiceRef.current.engine as 'piper' | 'xtts'
   156→      })
   157→    }
   158→  }, [])
   159→
   160→  // Process the speak queue
   161→  const processQueue = useCallback(async () => {
   162→    if (isProcessingRef.current || speakQueueRef.current.length === 0) return
   163→
   164→    isProcessingRef.current = true
   165→    setIsSpeaking(true)
   166→    const myGeneration = processingGenerationRef.current
   167→
   168→    while (speakQueueRef.current.length > 0) {
   169→      if (processingGenerationRef.current !== myGeneration) {
   170→        return
   171→      }
   172→
   173→      const text = speakQueueRef.current.shift()
   174→      if (!text) continue
   175→
   176→      try {
   177→        if (!window.electronAPI?.voiceSpeak) {
   178→          continue
   179→        }
   180→        const result = await window.electronAPI?.voiceSpeak?.(text)
   181→
   182→        if (processingGenerationRef.current !== myGeneration) {
   183→          return
   184→        }
   185→
   186→        if (result?.success && result.audioData) {
   187→          const base64Audio = result.audioData
   188→          await new Promise<void>((resolve) => {
   189→            audioResolveRef.current = resolve
   190→
   191→            const audioData = Uint8Array.from(atob(base64Audio), c => c.charCodeAt(0))
   192→            const blob = new Blob([audioData], { type: 'audio/wav' })
   193→            const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob)
   194→            const audio = new Audio(url)
   195→            audio.volume = volumeRef.current
   196→            audioRef.current = audio
   197→            audioUrlRef.current = url
   198→
   199→            const cleanup = () => {
   200→              URL.revokeObjectURL(url)
   201→              if (audioRef.current === audio) {
   202→                audioRef.current = null
   203→              }
   204→              if (audioUrlRef.current === url) {
   205→                audioUrlRef.current = null
   206→              }
   207→              audioResolveRef.current = null
   208→              resolve()
   209→            }
   210→
   211→            audio.onended = cleanup
   212→            audio.onerror = (e) => {
   213→              console.error('Audio playback error:', e)
   214→              cleanup()
   215→            }
   216→
   217→            audio.play().catch(e => {
   218→              console.error('Failed to play audio:', e)
   219→              cleanup()
   220→            })
   221→          })
   222→        } else if (result?.error) {
   223→          console.error('TTS error:', result.error)
   224→        }
   225→      } catch (e) {
   226→        console.error('TTS error:', e)
   227→      }
   228→    }
   229→
   230→    if (processingGenerationRef.current === myGeneration) {
   231→      isProcessingRef.current = false
   232→      setIsSpeaking(false)
   233→    }
   234→  }, [])
   235→
   236→  const speakText = useCallback((text: string) => {
   237→    if (!voiceOutputEnabledRef.current) return
   238→
   239→    const cleanText = text
   240→      .replace(/\x1b\[[0-9;]*[a-zA-Z]/g, '')
   241→      .replace(/[\r\n]+/g, ' ')
   242→      .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
   243→      .trim()
   244→
   245→    console.log('[TTS Debug] speakText called:', {
   246→      originalLength: text.length,
   247→      cleanedLength: cleanText.length,
   248→      original: text.substring(0, 100),
   249→      cleaned: cleanText.substring(0, 100)
   250→    })
   251→
   252→    if (cleanText.length < 3) return
   253→
   254→    if (skipOnNewRef.current) {
   255→      speakQueueRef.current = []
   256→      processingGenerationRef.current++
   257→      if (audioResolveRef.current) {
   258→        audioResolveRef.current()
   259→        audioResolveRef.current = null
   260→      }
   261→      if (audioRef.current) {
   262→        audioRef.current.pause()
   263→        audioRef.current = null
   264→      }
   265→      isProcessingRef.current = false
   266→    }
   267→
   268→    speakQueueRef.current.push(cleanText)
   269→    processQueue()
   270→  }, [processQueue])
   271→
   272→  const stopSpeaking = useCallback(() => {
   273→    speakQueueRef.current = []
   274→    processingGenerationRef.current++
   275→    if (audioResolveRef.current) {
   276→      audioResolveRef.current()
   277→      audioResolveRef.current = null
   278→    }
   279→    if (audioRef.current) {
   280→      audioRef.current.pause()
   281→      audioRef.current = null
   282→    }
   283→    window.electronAPI?.voiceStopSpeaking?.()
   284→    setIsSpeaking(false)
   285→    isProcessingRef.current = false
   286→  }, [])
   287→
   288→  // Stop speaking when disabled
   289→  useEffect(() => {
   290→    if (!voiceOutputEnabled) {
   291→      stopSpeaking()
   292→    }
   293→  }, [voiceOutputEnabled, stopSpeaking])
   294→
   295→  return {
   296→    voiceOutputEnabled,
   297→    isSpeaking,
   298→    volume,
   299→    speed,
   300→    skipOnNew,
   301→    setVoiceOutputEnabled,
   302→    setVolume,
   303→    setSpeed,
   304→    setSkipOnNew,
   305→    setProjectVoice,
   306→    speakText,
   307→    stopSpeaking,
   308→    refs,
   309→    setVoiceOutputEnabledState,
   310→    setVolumeState,
   311→    setSpeedState,
   312→    setSkipOnNewState
   313→  }
   314→}

    38→  // Voice Output (TTS) state
    39→  const [voiceOutputEnabled, setVoiceOutputEnabledState] = useState(false)
    40→  const [isSpeaking, setIsSpeaking] = useState(false)
    41→  const [volume, setVolumeState] = useState(1.0)
    42→  const [speed, setSpeedState] = useState(1.0)
    43→  const [skipOnNew, setSkipOnNewState] = useState(false)
    44→
    45→  // Refs
    46→  const audioRef = useRef<HTMLAudioElement | null>(null)
    47→  const audioUrlRef = useRef<string | null>(null)
    48→  const speakQueueRef = useRef<string[]>([])
    49→  const isProcessingRef = useRef(false)
    50→  const voiceOutputEnabledRef = useRef(voiceOutputEnabled)
    51→  const skipOnNewRef = useRef(skipOnNew)
    52→  const volumeRef = useRef(volume)
    53→  const processingGenerationRef = useRef(0)
    54→  const audioResolveRef = useRef<(() => void) | null>(null)
    55→  const projectVoiceRef = useRef<ProjectVoiceSettings | null>(null)
    56→  const globalVoiceRef = useRef<{ voice: string; engine: string } | null>(null)
    57→
    58→  const refs: TTSRefs = {
    59→    audioRef,
    60→    audioUrlRef,
    61→    speakQueueRef,
    62→    isProcessingRef,
    63→    voiceOutputEnabledRef,
    64→    skipOnNewRef,
    65→    volumeRef,
    66→    processingGenerationRef,
    67→    audioResolveRef,
    68→    projectVoiceRef,
    69→    globalVoiceRef
    70→  }
    71→
    72→  // Keep refs in sync to avoid stale closures
    73→  useEffect(() => {
    74→    voiceOutputEnabledRef.current = voiceOutputEnabled
    75→  }, [voiceOutputEnabled])
    76→
    77→  useEffect(() => {
    78→    skipOnNewRef.current = skipOnNew
    79→  }, [skipOnNew])
    80→
    81→  useEffect(() => {
    82→    volumeRef.current = volume
    83→  }, [volume])
    84→
    85→  // Save a single voice setting
    86→  const saveVoiceSetting = useCallback(async (key: string, value: boolean | number) => {
    87→    if (!settingsLoaded || !window.electronAPI) return
    88→    const settings = await window.electronAPI?.getSettings()
    89→    await window.electronAPI?.saveSettings({ ...settings, [key]: value })
    90→  }, [settingsLoaded])
    91→
    92→  // Debounced save for slider-based settings (volume, speed) to avoid excessive IPC calls
    93→  const debouncedSaveRef = useRef<{ timer: NodeJS.Timeout | null; pending: Map<string, boolean | number> }>({
    94→    timer: null,
    95→    pending: new Map()
    96→  })
    97→
    98→  const debouncedSaveVoiceSetting = useMemo(() => {
    99→    return (key: string, value: boolean | number) => {
   100→      debouncedSaveRef.current.pending.set(key, value)
   101→      if (debouncedSaveRef.current.timer) {
   102→        clearTimeout(debouncedSaveRef.current.timer)
   103→      }
   104→      debouncedSaveRef.current.timer = setTimeout(() => {
   105→        debouncedSaveRef.current.pending.forEach((val, k) => {
   106→          saveVoiceSetting(k, val)
   107→        })
   108→        debouncedSaveRef.current.pending.clear()
   109→        debouncedSaveRef.current.timer = null
   110→      }, 500)
   111→    }
   112→  }, [saveVoiceSetting])
   113→
   114→  // Wrapper for setVoiceOutputEnabled that saves setting
   115→  const setVoiceOutputEnabled = useCallback((enabled: boolean) => {
   116→    setVoiceOutputEnabledState(enabled)
   117→    saveVoiceSetting('voiceOutputEnabled', enabled)
   118→  }, [saveVoiceSetting])
   119→
   120→  // Update volume on current audio
   121→  const setVolume = useCallback((v: number) => {
   122→    const clamped = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, v))
   123→    setVolumeState(clamped)
   124→    if (audioRef.current) {
   125→      audioRef.current.volume = clamped
   126→    }
   127→    debouncedSaveVoiceSetting('voiceVolume', clamped)
   128→  }, [debouncedSaveVoiceSetting])
   129→
   130→  // Update speed and notify backend
   131→  const setSpeed = useCallback((s: number) => {
   132→    const clamped = Math.max(0.5, Math.min(2.0, s))
   133→    setSpeedState(clamped)
   134→    window.electronAPI?.voiceApplySettings?.({ ttsSpeed: clamped })
   135→    debouncedSaveVoiceSetting('voiceSpeed', clamped)
   136→  }, [debouncedSaveVoiceSetting])
   137→
   138→  // Update skipOnNew and save
   139→  const setSkipOnNew = useCallback((skip: boolean) => {
   140→    setSkipOnNewState(skip)
   141→    saveVoiceSetting('voiceSkipOnNew', skip)
   142→  }, [saveVoiceSetting])
   143→
   144→  // Set per-project voice override
   145→  const setProjectVoice = useCallback((settings: ProjectVoiceSettings | null) => {
   146→    projectVoiceRef.current = settings
   147→    if (settings?.ttsVoice && settings?.ttsEngine) {
   148→      window.electronAPI?.voiceApplySettings?.({
   149→        ttsVoice: settings.ttsVoice,
   150→        ttsEngine: settings.ttsEngine
   151→      })
   152→    } else if (globalVoiceRef.current) {
   153→      window.electronAPI?.voiceApplySettings?.({
   154→        ttsVoice: globalVoiceRef.current.voice,
   155→        ttsEngine: globalVoiceRef.current.engine as 'piper' | 'xtts'
   156→      })
   157→    }
   158→  }, [])
   159→
   160→  // Process the speak queue
   161→  const processQueue = useCallback(async () => {
   162→    if (isProcessingRef.current || speakQueueRef.current.length === 0) return
   163→
   164→    isProcessingRef.current = true
   165→    setIsSpeaking(true)
   166→    const myGeneration = processingGenerationRef.current
   167→
   168→    while (speakQueueRef.current.length > 0) {
   169→      if (processingGenerationRef.current !== myGeneration) {
   170→        return
   171→      }
   172→
   173→      const text = speakQueueRef.current.shift()
   174→      if (!text) continue
   175→
   176→      try {
   177→        if (!window.electronAPI?.voiceSpeak) {
   178→          continue
   179→        }
   180→        const result = await window.electronAPI?.voiceSpeak?.(text)
   181→
   182→        if (processingGenerationRef.current !== myGeneration) {
   183→          return
   184→        }
   185→
   186→        if (result?.success && result.audioData) {
   187→          const base64Audio = result.audioData
   188→          await new Promise<void>((resolve) => {
   189→            audioResolveRef.current = resolve
   190→
   191→            const audioData = Uint8Array.from(atob(base64Audio), c => c.charCodeAt(0))
   192→            const blob = new Blob([audioData], { type: 'audio/wav' })
   193→            const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob)
   194→            const audio = new Audio(url)
   195→            audio.volume = volumeRef.current
   196→            audioRef.current = audio
   197→            audioUrlRef.current = url
   198→
   199→            const cleanup = () => {
   200→              URL.revokeObjectURL(url)
   201→              if (audioRef.current === audio) {
   202→                audioRef.current = null
   203→              }
   204→              if (audioUrlRef.current === url) {
   205→                audioUrlRef.current = null
   206→              }
   207→              audioResolveRef.current = null
   208→              resolve()
   209→            }
   210→
   211→            audio.onended = cleanup
   212→            audio.onerror = (e) => {
   213→              console.error('Audio playback error:', e)
   214→              cleanup()
   215→            }
   216→
   217→            audio.play().catch(e => {
   218→              console.error('Failed to play audio:', e)
   219→              cleanup()
   220→            })
   221→          })
   222→        } else if (result?.error) {
   223→          console.error('TTS error:', result.error)
   224→        }
   225→      } catch (e) {
   226→        console.error('TTS error:', e)
   227→      }
   228→    }
   229→
   230→    if (processingGenerationRef.current === myGeneration) {
   231→      isProcessingRef.current = false
   232→      setIsSpeaking(false)
   233→    }
   234→  }, [])
   235→
   236→  const speakText = useCallback((text: string) => {
   237→    if (!voiceOutputEnabledRef.current) return
   238→
   239→    const cleanText = text
   240→      .replace(/\x1b\[[0-9;]*[a-zA-Z]/g, '')
   241→      .replace(/[\r\n]+/g, ' ')
   242→      .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
   243→      .trim()
   244→
   245→    console.log('[TTS Debug] speakText called:', {
   246→      originalLength: text.length,
   247→      cleanedLength: cleanText.length,
   248→      original: text.substring(0, 100),
   249→      cleaned: cleanText.substring(0, 100)
   250→    })
   251→
   252→    if (cleanText.length < 3) return
   253→
   254→    if (skipOnNewRef.current) {
   255→      speakQueueRef.current = []
   256→      processingGenerationRef.current++
   257→      if (audioResolveRef.current) {
   258→        audioResolveRef.current()
   259→        audioResolveRef.current = null
   260→      }
   261→      if (audioRef.current) {
   262→        audioRef.current.pause()
   263→        audioRef.current = null
   264→      }
   265→      isProcessingRef.current = false
   266→    }
   267→
   268→    speakQueueRef.current.push(cleanText)
   269→    processQueue()
   270→  }, [processQueue])
   271→
   272→  const stopSpeaking = useCallback(() => {
   273→    speakQueueRef.current = []
   274→    processingGenerationRef.current++
   275→    if (audioResolveRef.current) {
   276→      audioResolveRef.current()
   277→      audioResolveRef.current = null
   278→    }
   279→    if (audioRef.current) {
   280→      audioRef.current.pause()
   281→      audioRef.current = null
   282→    }
   283→    window.electronAPI?.voiceStopSpeaking?.()
   284→    setIsSpeaking(false)
   285→    isProcessingRef.current = false
   286→  }, [])
   287→
   288→  // Stop speaking when disabled
   289→  useEffect(() => {
   290→    if (!voiceOutputEnabled) {
   291→      stopSpeaking()
   292→    }
   293→  }, [voiceOutputEnabled, stopSpeaking])
   294→
   295→  return {
   296→    voiceOutputEnabled,
   297→    isSpeaking,
   298→    volume,
   299→    speed,
   300→    skipOnNew,
   301→    setVoiceOutputEnabled,
   302→    setVolume,
   303→    setSpeed,
   304→    setSkipOnNew,
   305→    setProjectVoice,
   306→    speakText,
   307→    stopSpeaking,
   308→    refs,
   309→    setVoiceOutputEnabledState,
   310→    setVolumeState,
   311→    setSpeedState,
   312→    setSkipOnNewState
   313→  }
   314→}
   315→
```

1→// Voice catalog - fetching and downloading from Hugging Face
     2→
     3→import * as path from 'path'
     4→
     5→import { piperVoicesDir, VOICES_CATALOG_URL, HF_BASE_URL } from './paths.js'
     6→import { downloadFile, fetchJson, ensureDir } from './download.js'
     7→import type { VoiceCatalogEntry, ProgressCallback } from './types.js'
     8→
     9→const CATALOG_CACHE_DURATION = 1000 * 60 * 10 // 10 minutes
    10→
    11→let voicesCatalogCache: Record<string, VoiceCatalogEntry> | null = null
    12→let catalogCacheTime = 0
    13→
    14→export async function fetchVoicesCatalog(forceRefresh: boolean = false): Promise<VoiceCatalogEntry[]> {
    15→  try {
    16→    // Use cache if fresh (unless force refresh requested)
    17→    const now = Date.now()
    18→    if (!forceRefresh && voicesCatalogCache && (now - catalogCacheTime) < CATALOG_CACHE_DURATION) {
    19→      return Object.values(voicesCatalogCache)
    20→    }
    21→
    22→    // Fetch from Hugging Face
    23→    const catalog = await fetchJson<Record<string, VoiceCatalogEntry>>(VOICES_CATALOG_URL)
    24→    voicesCatalogCache = catalog
    25→    catalogCacheTime = now
    26→
    27→    return Object.values(catalog)
    28→  } catch (e: any) {
    29→    console.error('Failed to fetch voice catalog:', e)
    30→    // Return cached data if available, even if stale
    31→    if (voicesCatalogCache) {
    32→      return Object.values(voicesCatalogCache)
    33→    }
    34→    throw e
    35→  }
    36→}
    37→
    38→export async function downloadVoiceFromCatalog(
    39→  voiceKey: string,
    40→  onProgress?: ProgressCallback
    41→): Promise<{ success: boolean; error?: string }> {
    42→  try {
    43→    // Fetch catalog if not cached
    44→    if (!voicesCatalogCache) {
    45→      await fetchVoicesCatalog()
    46→    }
    47→
    48→    const voiceEntry = voicesCatalogCache?.[voiceKey]
    49→    if (!voiceEntry) {
    50→      return { success: false, error: `Voice "${voiceKey}" not found in catalog` }
    51→    }
    52→
    53→    ensureDir(piperVoicesDir)
    54→
    55→    // Find .onnx and .onnx.json files
    56→    const files = Object.entries(voiceEntry.files)
    57→    const onnxFile = files.find(([p]) => p.endsWith('.onnx') && !p.endsWith('.onnx.json'))
    58→    const configFile = files.find(([p]) => p.endsWith('.onnx.json'))
    59→
    60→    if (!onnxFile || !configFile) {
    61→      return { success: false, error: 'Voice files not found in catalog entry' }
    62→    }
    63→
    64→    const [onnxPath, onnxMeta] = onnxFile
    65→    const [configPath] = configFile
    66→
    67→    // Construct file names and URLs
    68→    const onnxFileName = path.basename(onnxPath)
    69→    const configFileName = path.basename(configPath)
    70→    const onnxUrl = `${HF_BASE_URL}/${onnxPath}`
    71→    const configUrl = `${HF_BASE_URL}/${configPath}`
    72→
    73→    const localOnnxPath = path.join(piperVoicesDir, onnxFileName)
    74→    const localConfigPath = path.join(piperVoicesDir, configFileName)
    75→
    76→    // Download model file (larger, show progress)
    77→    const sizeMB = Math.round(onnxMeta.size_bytes / (1024 * 1024))
    78→    onProgress?.(`Downloading ${voiceEntry.name} (${sizeMB}MB)...`, 0)
    79→
    80→    await downloadFile(onnxUrl, localOnnxPath, (percent) => {
    81→      onProgress?.('Downloading voice model...', Math.round(percent * 0.9))
    82→    })
    83→
    84→    // Download config file
    85→    onProgress?.('Downloading config...', 95)
    86→    await downloadFile(configUrl, localConfigPath)
    87→
    88→    onProgress?.('Voice installed successfully', 100)
    89→    return { success: true }
    90→  } catch (e: any) {
    91→    return { success: false, error: e.message }
    92→  }
    93→}
    94→
