file.content:
// WhisperTranscriber instance interface for type safety
export interface WhisperInstance {
  loadModel(): Promise<void>
  startRecording(): Promise<void>
  stopRecording(): void
  destroy(): void
}

// WhisperTranscriber config - modelSize accepts string (library has loose typing)
export interface WhisperTranscriberConfig {
  modelUrl: string
  modelSize: string  // Library accepts any string, we pass our WhisperModelSize
  audioIntervalMs?: number
  onTranscription: (text: string) => void
  onProgress?: (progress: number) => void
  onStatus?: (status: string) => void
  maxRecordingTime?: number
  debug?: boolean
}

// Map to HuggingFace URLs for all Whisper model sizes
export type WhisperModelSize = 'tiny.en' | 'base.en' | 'small.en' | 'medium.en' | 'large-v3'

export interface ProjectVoiceSettings {
  ttsVoice?: string
  ttsEngine?: 'piper' | 'xtts'
}

export interface VoiceContextValue {
  // Voice Output (TTS)
  voiceOutputEnabled: boolean
  setVoiceOutputEnabled: (enabled: boolean) => void
  speakText: (text: string) => void
  stopSpeaking: () => void
  isSpeaking: boolean
  volume: number
  setVolume: (volume: number) => void
  speed: number
  setSpeed: (speed: number) => void
  skipOnNew: boolean
  setSkipOnNew: (skip: boolean) => void
  setProjectVoice: (settings: ProjectVoiceSettings | null) => void  // Per-project voice override

  // Voice Input (STT)
  isRecording: boolean
  isModelLoading: boolean
  isModelLoaded: boolean
  modelLoadProgress: number
  modelLoadStatus: string
  currentTranscription: string  // Live transcription while recording
  whisperModel: WhisperModelSize
  setWhisperModel: (model: WhisperModelSize) => void
  audioLevel: number            // Current mic input level 0-100
  silenceThreshold: number      // Level below which audio is considered silence 0-100
  setSilenceThreshold: (threshold: number) => void
  startRecording: (onTranscription: (text: string) => void) => Promise<void>
  stopRecording: () => void
}

// TTS refs interface for handler functions
export interface TTSRefs {
  audioRef: React.MutableRefObject<HTMLAudioElement | null>
  audioUrlRef: React.MutableRefObject<string | null>
  speakQueueRef: React.MutableRefObject<string[]>
  isProcessingRef: React.MutableRefObject<boolean>
  voiceOutputEnabledRef: React.MutableRefObject<boolean>
  skipOnNewRef: React.MutableRefObject<boolean>
  volumeRef: React.MutableRefObject<number>
  processingGenerationRef: React.MutableRefObject<number>
  audioResolveRef: React.MutableRefObject<(() => void) | null>
  projectVoiceRef: React.MutableRefObject<ProjectVoiceSettings | null>
  globalVoiceRef: React.MutableRefObject<{ voice: string; engine: string } | null>
}

// STT refs interface for handler functions
export interface STTRefs {
  whisperRef: React.MutableRefObject<WhisperInstance | null>
  onTranscriptionRef: React.MutableRefObject<((text: string) => void) | null>
  finalTranscriptionRef: React.MutableRefObject<string>
  silenceTimerRef: React.MutableRefObject<NodeJS.Timeout | null>
  isRecordingRef: React.MutableRefObject<boolean>
}

1→// Voice-related utility functions
     2→
     3→/**
     4→ * Build sample audio URL from Piper voice key
     5→ * Pattern: https://huggingface.co/rhasspy/piper-voices/resolve/main/{lang}/{lang_region}/{name}/{quality}/samples/speaker_0.mp3
     6→ */
     7→export function getSampleUrl(voiceKey: string): string | null {
     8→  // Parse key like "en_US-lessac-medium" or "de_DE-thorsten-medium"
     9→  const match = voiceKey.match(/^([a-z]{2})_([A-Z]{2})-(.+)-([a-z_]+)$/)
    10→  if (!match) return null
    11→  const [, lang, region, name, quality] = match
    12→  return `https://huggingface.co/rhasspy/piper-voices/resolve/main/${lang}/${lang}_${region}/${name}/${quality}/samples/speaker_0.mp3`
    13→}
    14→

1→import { useRef, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react'
     2→import { useVoice } from '../../contexts/VoiceContext.js'
     3→import { stripAnsi } from './utils.js'
     4→import {
     5→  TTS_TAG_REGEX,
     6→  CODE_PATTERN_REGEX,
     7→  MAX_TTS_BUFFER_SIZE,
     8→  MAX_SPOKEN_SET_SIZE,
     9→  MIN_SILENT_PERIOD_MS,
    10→} from './constants.js'
    11→
    12→interface UseTTSOptions {
    13→  ptyId: string
    14→  isActive: boolean
    15→}
    16→
    17→interface UseTTSReturn {
    18→  processTTSChunk: (cleanChunk: string) => void
    19→  handleUserInput: (data: string) => void
    20→  resetTTSState: () => void
    21→  prePopulateSpokenContent: (chunks: string[]) => void
    22→}
    23→
    24→/**
    25→ * Hook for handling Text-to-Speech functionality in the terminal.
    26→ * Extracts TTS tags from terminal output and speaks content when appropriate.
    27→ */
    28→export function useTTS({ ptyId, isActive }: UseTTSOptions): UseTTSReturn {
    29→  const { voiceOutputEnabled, speakText } = useVoice()
    30→
    31→  // Refs for TTS state
    32→  const voiceOutputEnabledRef = useRef(voiceOutputEnabled)
    33→  const isActiveRef = useRef(isActive)
    34→  const spokenContentRef = useRef<Set<string>>(new Set())
    35→  const silentModeRef = useRef(true)
    36→  const sessionStartTimeRef = useRef(Date.now())
    37→  const ttsBufferRef = useRef('')
    38→
    39→  // Keep refs in sync with props
    40→  useEffect(() => {
    41→    voiceOutputEnabledRef.current = voiceOutputEnabled
    42→  }, [voiceOutputEnabled])
    43→
    44→  useEffect(() => {
    45→    isActiveRef.current = isActive
    46→  }, [isActive])
    47→
    48→  // Reset TTS state for new session
    49→  const resetTTSState = useCallback(() => {
    50→    silentModeRef.current = true
    51→    spokenContentRef.current.clear()
    52→    ttsBufferRef.current = ''
    53→    sessionStartTimeRef.current = Date.now()
    54→  }, [])
    55→
    56→  // Pre-populate spoken content from buffered data (for HMR recovery)
    57→  const prePopulateSpokenContent = useCallback((chunks: string[]) => {
    58→    for (const chunk of chunks) {
    59→      const cleanChunk = stripAnsi(chunk)
    60→      const tagRegex = /(?:«tts»|<tts>)([\s\S]*?)(?:«\/tts»|<\/tts>)/g
    61→      let match
    62→      while ((match = tagRegex.exec(cleanChunk)) !== null) {
    63→        const content = match[1].trim()
    64→        if (content.length > 3) {
    65→          spokenContentRef.current.add(content)
    66→        }
    67→      }
    68→    }
    69→  }, [])
    70→
    71→  // Handle user input to exit silent mode
    72→  const handleUserInput = useCallback((data: string) => {
    73→    // Ignore terminal control sequences
    74→    if (data.startsWith('\x1b[') && (data.endsWith('R') || data === '\x1b[I' || data === '\x1b[O')) {
    75→      return
    76→    }
    77→
    78→    // Ignore Enter and arrow keys - these navigate TOS dialogs
    79→    const isEnterKey = data === '\r' || data === '\n'
    80→    const isArrowKey = data === '\x1b[A' || data === '\x1b[B' || data === '\x1b[C' || data === '\x1b[D'
    81→    const timeSinceStart = Date.now() - sessionStartTimeRef.current
    82→
    83→    if (silentModeRef.current && !isEnterKey && !isArrowKey && timeSinceStart >= MIN_SILENT_PERIOD_MS) {
    84→      silentModeRef.current = false
    85→      // Clear TTS buffer to discard partial tags from session restoration
    86→      ttsBufferRef.current = ''
    87→    }
    88→  }, [])
    89→
    90→  // Process a chunk of terminal data for TTS
    91→  const processTTSChunk = useCallback((cleanChunk: string) => {
    92→    ttsBufferRef.current += cleanChunk
    93→
    94→    // Extract all complete TTS markers from buffer
    95→    TTS_TAG_REGEX.lastIndex = 0
    96→    let match
    97→    let lastIndex = 0
    98→
    99→    while ((match = TTS_TAG_REGEX.exec(ttsBufferRef.current)) !== null) {
   100→      lastIndex = match.index + match[0].length
   101→      const content = match[1].trim()
   102→
   103→      // Skip if content looks like code
   104→      const looksLikeCode = CODE_PATTERN_REGEX.test(content)
   105→      const looksLikeProse = content.length > 5 && /^[a-zA-Z]/.test(content) && !looksLikeCode
   106→
   107→      if (looksLikeProse && !spokenContentRef.current.has(content)) {
   108→        spokenContentRef.current.add(content)
   109→        // Only speak if: voice enabled, tab active, and not in silent mode
   110→        if (voiceOutputEnabledRef.current && isActiveRef.current && !silentModeRef.current) {
   111→          speakText(content)
   112→        }
   113→      }
   114→    }
   115→
   116→    // Keep only the part after the last complete tag
   117→    if (lastIndex > 0) {
   118→      ttsBufferRef.current = ttsBufferRef.current.substring(lastIndex)
   119→    }
   120→
   121→    // If buffer has no opening marker, clear it
   122→    if (!ttsBufferRef.current.includes('«tts') && !ttsBufferRef.current.includes('<tts')) {
   123→      ttsBufferRef.current = ''
   124→    }
   125→
   126→    // Limit buffer size
   127→    if (ttsBufferRef.current.length > MAX_TTS_BUFFER_SIZE) {
   128→      ttsBufferRef.current = ttsBufferRef.current.substring(ttsBufferRef.current.length - MAX_TTS_BUFFER_SIZE)
   129→    }
   130→
   131→    // Limit spoken set size
   132→    if (spokenContentRef.current.size > MAX_SPOKEN_SET_SIZE) {
   133→      const entries = Array.from(spokenContentRef.current)
   134→      spokenContentRef.current = new Set(entries.slice(-500))
   135→    }
   136→  }, [speakText])
   137→
   138→  return {
   139→    processTTSChunk,
   140→    handleUserInput,
   141→    resetTTSState,
   142→    prePopulateSpokenContent,
   143→  }
   144→}
   145→

     1→// Voice discovery - finding and managing installed voices
     2→
     3→import * as fs from 'fs'
     4→import * as path from 'path'
     5→
     6→import { piperVoicesDir, customVoicesDir } from './paths.js'
     7→import { PIPER_VOICES, type PiperVoiceName, type InstalledVoice, type VoicePaths, type CustomVoiceMetadata } from './types.js'
     8→import { ensureDir } from './download.js'
     9→
    10→export function getPiperVoicePath(voice: string): VoicePaths | null {
    11→  const voiceInfo = PIPER_VOICES[voice as PiperVoiceName]
    12→  if (!voiceInfo) return null
    13→
    14→  const modelPath = path.join(piperVoicesDir, voiceInfo.file)
    15→  const configPath = path.join(piperVoicesDir, voiceInfo.config)
    16→
    17→  if (fs.existsSync(modelPath) && fs.existsSync(configPath)) {
    18→    return { model: modelPath, config: configPath }
    19→  }
    20→  return null
    21→}
    22→
    23→export function getInstalledPiperVoices(): string[] {
    24→  if (!fs.existsSync(piperVoicesDir)) return []
    25→  return (Object.keys(PIPER_VOICES) as PiperVoiceName[]).filter(voice =>
    26→    getPiperVoicePath(voice) !== null
    27→  )
    28→}
    29→
    30→export function getAnyVoicePath(voiceKey: string): VoicePaths | null {
    31→  // Check if it's a custom voice
    32→  if (voiceKey.startsWith('custom:')) {
    33→    const baseKey = voiceKey.replace('custom:', '')
    34→    const modelPath = path.join(customVoicesDir, `${baseKey}.onnx`)
    35→    const configPath = path.join(customVoicesDir, `${baseKey}.onnx.json`)
    36→    if (fs.existsSync(modelPath) && fs.existsSync(configPath)) {
    37→      return { model: modelPath, config: configPath }
    38→    }
    39→    return null
    40→  }
    41→
    42→  // Check built-in voices first
    43→  const builtinPath = getPiperVoicePath(voiceKey)
    44→  if (builtinPath) return builtinPath
    45→
    46→  // Check downloaded voices
    47→  const modelPath = path.join(piperVoicesDir, `${voiceKey}.onnx`)
    48→  const configPath = path.join(piperVoicesDir, `${voiceKey}.onnx.json`)
    49→  if (fs.existsSync(modelPath) && fs.existsSync(configPath)) {
    50→    return { model: modelPath, config: configPath }
```

1→import { app } from 'electron'
     2→import * as fs from 'fs'
     3→import * as path from 'path'
     4→import { isWindows } from './platform.js'
     5→
     6→// Directory structure
     7→export const depsDir = path.join(app.getPath('userData'), 'deps')
     8→export const xttsDir = path.join(depsDir, 'xtts')
     9→export const xttsVoicesDir = path.join(xttsDir, 'voices')
    10→export const xttsVenvDir = path.join(xttsDir, 'venv')
    11→export const xttsPythonDir = path.join(xttsDir, 'python')
    12→export const xttsScriptPath = path.join(xttsDir, 'xtts_helper.py')
    13→
    14→// Standalone Python download URL (python-build-standalone)
    15→export const STANDALONE_PYTHON_VERSION = '3.12.12'
    16→export const STANDALONE_PYTHON_TAG = '20251217'
    17→export const STANDALONE_PYTHON_URL = isWindows
    18→  ? `https://github.com/astral-sh/python-build-standalone/releases/download/${STANDALONE_PYTHON_TAG}/cpython-${STANDALONE_PYTHON_VERSION}+${STANDALONE_PYTHON_TAG}-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc-install_only.tar.gz`
    19→  : `https://github.com/astral-sh/python-build-standalone/releases/download/${STANDALONE_PYTHON_TAG}/cpython-${STANDALONE_PYTHON_VERSION}+${STANDALONE_PYTHON_TAG}-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu-install_only.tar.gz`
    20→
    21→// Hugging Face XTTS-v2 sample voices
    22→export const XTTS_HF_BASE = 'https://huggingface.co/coqui/XTTS-v2/resolve/main/samples'
    23→
    24→export function getStandalonePython(): string {
    25→  return isWindows
    26→    ? path.join(xttsPythonDir, 'python', 'python.exe')
    27→    : path.join(xttsPythonDir, 'python', 'bin', 'python3')
    28→}
    29→
    30→export function getVenvPython(): string {
    31→  return isWindows
    32→    ? path.join(xttsVenvDir, 'Scripts', 'python.exe')
    33→    : path.join(xttsVenvDir, 'bin', 'python')
    34→}
    35→
    36→export function getVenvPip(): string {
    37→  return isWindows
    38→    ? path.join(xttsVenvDir, 'Scripts', 'pip.exe')
    39→    : path.join(xttsVenvDir, 'bin', 'pip')
    40→}
    41→
    42→export function ensureDir(dir: string): void {
    43→  if (!fs.existsSync(dir)) {
    44→    fs.mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true })
    45→  }
    46→}
    47→
    48→// XTTS supported languages
    49→export const XTTS_LANGUAGES = [
    50→  { code: 'en', name: 'English' },
    51→  { code: 'es', name: 'Spanish' },
    52→  { code: 'fr', name: 'French' },
    53→  { code: 'de', name: 'German' },
    54→  { code: 'it', name: 'Italian' },
    55→  { code: 'pt', name: 'Portuguese' },
    56→  { code: 'pl', name: 'Polish' },
    57→  { code: 'tr', name: 'Turkish' },
    58→  { code: 'ru', name: 'Russian' },
    59→  { code: 'nl', name: 'Dutch' },
    60→  { code: 'cs', name: 'Czech' },
    61→  { code: 'ar', name: 'Arabic' },
    62→  { code: 'zh-cn', name: 'Chinese' },
    63→  { code: 'ja', name: 'Japanese' },
    64→  { code: 'hu', name: 'Hungarian' },
    65→  { code: 'ko', name: 'Korean' },
    66→  { code: 'hi', name: 'Hindi' }
    67→] as const
    68→
    69→export type XTTSLanguage = typeof XTTS_LANGUAGES[number]['code']
    70→
    71→export interface XTTSVoice {
    72→  id: string
    73→  name: string
    74→  language: XTTSLanguage
    75→  referencePath: string
    76→  createdAt: number
    77→}
    78→
    79→export interface XTTSStatus {
    80→  installed: boolean
    81→  pythonPath: string | null
    82→  modelDownloaded: boolean
    83→  error?: string
    84→}

import { ipcRenderer } from 'electron'
import type { VoiceSettings } from '../types/voice.js'

export const voiceHandlers = {
  // STT/TTS
  voiceCheckWhisper: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('voice:checkWhisper'),
  voiceInstallWhisper: (model: string) => ipcRenderer.invoke('voice:installWhisper', model),
  voiceTranscribe: (pcmData: Float32Array) => ipcRenderer.invoke('voice:transcribe', pcmData),
  voiceSetWhisperModel: (model: string) => ipcRenderer.invoke('voice:setWhisperModel', model),
  voiceCheckTTS: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('voice:checkTTS'),
  voiceGetFullStatus: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('voice:getFullStatus'),
  voiceInstallPiper: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('voice:installPiper'),
  voiceInstallVoice: (voice: string) => ipcRenderer.invoke('voice:installVoice', voice),
  voiceSpeak: (text: string) => ipcRenderer.invoke('voice:speak', text),
  voiceStopSpeaking: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('voice:stopSpeaking'),
  voiceGetVoices: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('voice:getVoices'),
  voiceGetWhisperModels: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('voice:getWhisperModels'),
  voiceSetVoice: (voice: string | { voice: string; engine: 'piper' | 'xtts' }) => ipcRenderer.invoke('voice:setVoice', voice),
  voiceGetSettings: (): Promise<VoiceSettings> => ipcRenderer.invoke('voice:getSettings'),
  voiceApplySettings: (settings: Partial<VoiceSettings>) => ipcRenderer.invoke('voice:applySettings', settings),

  // Voice catalog
  voiceFetchCatalog: (forceRefresh?: boolean) => ipcRenderer.invoke('voice:fetchCatalog', forceRefresh),
  voiceDownloadFromCatalog: (voiceKey: string) => ipcRenderer.invoke('voice:downloadFromCatalog', voiceKey),
  voiceGetInstalled: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('voice:getInstalled'),
  voiceImportCustom: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('voice:importCustom'),
  voiceRemoveCustom: (voiceKey: string) => ipcRenderer.invoke('voice:removeCustom', voiceKey),
  voiceOpenCustomFolder: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('voice:openCustomFolder'),

  // XTTS (voice cloning)
  xttsCheck: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('xtts:check'),
  xttsInstall: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('xtts:install'),
  xttsCreateVoice: (audioPath: string, name: string, language: string) =>
    ipcRenderer.invoke('xtts:createVoice', { audioPath, name, language }),
  xttsGetVoices: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('xtts:getVoices'),
  xttsDeleteVoice: (voiceId: string) => ipcRenderer.invoke('xtts:deleteVoice', voiceId),
  xttsSpeak: (text: string, voiceId: string, language?: string) =>
    ipcRenderer.invoke('xtts:speak', { text, voiceId, language }),
  xttsSelectAudio: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('xtts:selectAudio'),
  xttsGetLanguages: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('xtts:getLanguages'),
  xttsGetSampleVoices: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('xtts:getSampleVoices'),
  xttsDownloadSampleVoice: (sampleId: string) => ipcRenderer.invoke('xtts:downloadSampleVoice', sampleId),
  xttsSelectMediaFile: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('xtts:selectMediaFile'),
  xttsGetMediaDuration: (filePath: string) => ipcRenderer.invoke('xtts:getMediaDuration', filePath),
  xttsExtractAudioClip: (inputPath: string, startTime: number, endTime: number) =>
    ipcRenderer.invoke('xtts:extractAudioClip', { inputPath, startTime, endTime }),

  // TTS instructions (CLAUDE.md)
  ttsInstallInstructions: (projectPath: string) => ipcRenderer.invoke('tts:installInstructions', projectPath),
  ttsRemoveInstructions: (projectPath: string) => ipcRenderer.invoke('tts:removeInstructions', projectPath)
}

Explore the voice I/O codebase in "/home/user/Programs/Claude Projects/Claude-Terminal". I need a thorough understanding of:

1. All files related to STT (speech-to-text), TTS (text-to-speech), voice input/output, Whisper, microphone, audio
2. How voice settings are managed (per-project, global)
3. How Whisper models are loaded
4. Silence detection logic
5. TTS audio queue/playback
6. XTTS integration
7. Voice catalog/model downloads
8. Audio resource cleanup

Search for files with names containing: voice, stt, tts, whisper, audio, microphone, speech, transcri
Also search for code containing: whisper, silence, tts, speech, microphone, audioContext, AudioWorklet

Provide file paths and brief descriptions of what each file does, noting any potential bugs you see.

content.text:
Perfect! Now I have a comprehensive understanding of the voice I/O codebase. Let me provide the detailed analysis:

## Voice I/O Codebase - Comprehensive Analysis

I have thoroughly explored the voice I/O system in the Claude Terminal codebase. Here's a detailed breakdown:

### **1. CORE VOICE MANAGEMENT FILES**

#### Main Entry Points:
- **/home/user/Programs/Claude Projects/Claude-Terminal/src/main/voice-manager.ts**
  - Singleton VoiceManager class coordinating all voice operations
  - Manages persistent settings in `voice-settings.json`
  - Routes between Piper TTS and XTTS engines
  - Loads settings on instantiation, saves on changes
  - Manages Whisper model switching and XTTS quality parameters (temperature, topK, topP, repetitionPenalty)

- **/home/user/Programs/Claude Projects/Claude-Terminal/src/main/xtts-manager.ts**
  - Manages XTTS voice cloning (multilingual, custom voices)
  - Handles Python installation, venv setup, standalone Python download
  - Delegates to XTTSServer for synthesis
  - Manages voice creation, deletion, sample voice downloads
  - Downloads from Hugging Face sample voices

- **/home/user/Programs/Claude Projects/Claude-Terminal/src/main/xtts-server.ts**
  - IPC-based Python subprocess server for XTTS synthesis
  - Maintains persistent connection with pending request map
  - Uses stdin/stdout JSON-RPC communication
  - 300s timeout for synthesis operations
  - Handles process lifecycle and graceful shutdown

---

### **2. STT (SPEECH-TO-TEXT) IMPLEMENTATION**

#### Backend:
- **/home/user/Programs/Claude Projects/Claude-Terminal/src/main/voice/whisper-stt.ts**
  - Whisper model download/installation (tiny.en, base.en, small.en, medium.en, large-v3)
  - Models stored in `~/.userData/deps/whisper/models/`
  - **BUG**: `transcribe()` function returns error - "Voice input coming soon! Model is ready, but whisper.cpp binary integration is pending" (line 74-79)
  - Currently only handles model downloads, no actual transcription implemented

#### Frontend:
- **/home/user/Programs/Claude Projects/Claude-Terminal/src/renderer/contexts/VoiceContext/sttHandlers.ts**
  - Uses `whisper-web-transcriber` npm package (dynamically imported to save bundle ~4.5MB)
  - **Real Silence Detection Logic** (lines 84-148):
    - AudioContext + AnalyserNode with FFT size 256, smoothing 0.3
    - Calculates average byte frequency data (0-255) normalized to 0-100
    - 100ms monitoring interval
    - After 2 seconds of silence: auto-submits transcription and restarts Whisper
    - Tracks `silenceStartRef`, `speechDetectedRef`, `processingUtteranceRef`
  - ANSI stripping pattern (lines 196-211) removes: `[BLANK_AUDIO]`, `[Silence]`, `(silence)`, `[Pause]`, `[Music]`, `[Applause]`, `[Laughter]`, timestamps, etc.
  - 3s audio interval to Whisper for near-realtime processing
  - Whisper model downloaded from HuggingFace (ggerganov/whisper.cpp, ggml format)

---

### **3. TTS (TEXT-TO-SPEECH) IMPLEMENTATION**

#### Piper Engine:
- **/home/user/Programs/Claude Projects/Claude-Terminal/src/main/voice/piper-tts.ts**
  - Spawns Piper binary as subprocess
  - Models in `~/.userData/deps/piper/voices/`
  - Pre-built voices: en_US-libritts_r-medium, en_GB-jenny_dioco-medium, en_US-ryan-medium, en_US-amy-medium, en_US-arctic-medium, en_GB-alan-medium
  - Passes text via stdin, outputs WAV to temp file
  - Speed conversion: length_scale = 1.0 / speed (inverted logic)
  - Cleanup: removes temp files after playback
  - **Potential Bug**: Uses global `speakingProcess` variable (line 15) - not ref-safe if concurrent calls

#### XTTS Engine:
- **/home/user/Programs/Claude Projects/Claude-Terminal/src/main/xtts-synthesis.ts**
  - Communicates with XTTSServer Python process
  - Supports: temperature, speed, topK, topP, repetitionPenalty options
  - Uses ffmpeg for audio extraction (extractAudioClip: 3-30s clips at 22050Hz mono)
  - Requires ffmpeg/ffprobe for duration detection

#### Frontend TTS Queue:
- **/home/user/Programs/Claude Projects/Claude-Terminal/src/renderer/contexts/VoiceContext/ttsHandlers.ts**
  - **Audio Queue & Playback** (lines 48-234):
    - `speakQueueRef` stores queued text items
    - Processes serially with `processQueue()` callback
    - `isProcessingRef` guard prevents concurrent synthesis
    - `processingGenerationRef` tracks cancellation generation (incremented on skipOnNew/stop)
  - HTML5 Audio playback with blob URLs
  - URL revocation on cleanup via `URL.revokeObjectURL()`
  - Debounced saves for volume/speed sliders (500ms)
  - ANSI stripping: removes `\x1b[[0-9;]*[a-zA-Z]` escape codes (line 240)
  - Newline/whitespace normalization
  - Per-project voice override support (projectVoiceRef vs globalVoiceRef)

#### Terminal-Level TTS:
- **/home/user/Programs/Claude Projects/Claude-Terminal/src/renderer/components/terminal/useTTS.ts**
  - Extracts `«tts»...«/tts»` markers from terminal output
  - Tracks spoken content to avoid repeats (Set limited to 500 items)
  - 2s silent mode before first user input (prevents auto-speaking of session restore)
  - Tracks TTS buffer for incomplete tags (maxed at 50KB)
  - Code pattern detection to skip code blocks

---

### **4. VOICE SETTINGS MANAGEMENT**

#### Global Settings (Persistent):
- **Location**: `~/.userData/voice-settings.json`
- **Scope**: Application-wide Piper/XTTS engine choice
- **Settings Stored**:
  - `whisperModel`: 'tiny.en' | 'base.en' | 'small.en' | 'medium.en' | 'large-v3'
  - `ttsEngine`: 'piper' | 'xtts'
  - `ttsVoice`: Selected Piper voice key (e.g., 'en_US-libritts_r-medium')
  - `xttsVoice`: Selected XTTS voice ID
  - `ttsSpeed`: 0.5-2.0 range
  - XTTS parameters: temperature (0.1-1.0), topK (1-100), topP (0.1-1.0), repetitionPenalty (1.0-10.0)

- **VoiceManager.applySettings()** (line 294-320 in voice-manager.ts):
  - Clamps all numeric values to safe ranges
  - Calls savePersistedSettings() immediately
  - Engine selection validates voice exists

#### Per-Project Settings:
- Stored in project workspace configuration
- Via `setProjectVoice()` in ttsHandlers
- Overrides global settings for specific projects
- Communicated to backend via IPC: `voiceApplySettings({ttsVoice, ttsEngine})`

#### Session Settings:
- UI sliders: volume (0-1), speed (0.5-2.0)
- Debounced save to settings (500ms)
- Microphone selection (stored but not actively used)
- Silence threshold (0-100, default 5)

---

### **5. WHISPER MODEL LOADING**

#### Client-Side (Browser):
- **Dynamic Import** (sttHandlers line 5-15):
  ```typescript
  let WhisperTranscriberClass = null
  async function loadWhisperTranscriber() {
    const module = await import('whisper-web-transcriber')
    WhisperTranscriberClass = module.WhisperTranscriber
  }
  ```
- Models downloaded on-demand from HuggingFace URLs (WHISPER_MODEL_URLS constant)
- Models cached in browser IndexedDB by whisper-web-transcriber library
- Auto-confirm prompt via window.confirm override (line 231-238)
- Models: ggml format from ggerganov/whisper.cpp repo

#### Server-Side (Electron):
- Models stored in `~/.userData/deps/whisper/models/`
- Downloaded via `downloadWhisperModel()` in whisper-stt.ts
- Used for backend transcription (when implemented)
- Currently NOT integrated with any transcription binary

---

### **6. SILENCE DETECTION LOGIC**

**In sttHandlers.ts (startAudioMonitoring, lines 84-148)**:

```
1. Create AudioContext + MediaStream from microphone
2. AnalyserNode: FFT size 256, smoothing 0.3
3. Every 100ms:
   - Get frequency data (0-255 scale)
   - Calculate average: sum / 256
   - Normalize to 0-100: (avg / 255) * 100
4. If level < threshold (default 5):
   - Start silence timer on first drop
   - After 2000ms of silence WITH prior speech:
     a. Submit final transcription via callback
     b. Clear buffer & reset flags
     c. stopRecording() → startRecording() to clear Whisper buffer
5. If level >= threshold:
   - Reset silence timer, set speechDetectedRef = true
```

**Guards**:
- `processingUtteranceRef` prevents re-entry during stop/restart
- `speechDetectedRef` ensures audio exceeded threshold at least once (avoids false triggers)
- Final transcription trimmed & length > 1 check

---

### **7. TTS AUDIO QUEUE & PLAYBACK**

**In ttsHandlers.ts (processQueue, lines 161-234)**:

```
1. If already processing or queue empty: skip
2. Set isProcessingRef = true, setIsSpeaking(true)
3. For each queued text:
   a. Call window.electronAPI.voiceSpeak(text) → IPC to main process
   b. Backend returns { success, audioData (base64 WAV) }
   c. Decode base64 → Uint8Array → Blob(audio/wav)
   d. Create object URL
   e. Create <Audio> element, set volume
   f. Wrap in Promise, resolve on audio.onended
   g. On cleanup: revoke URL, remove audio ref
4. Check generation hasn't changed (skipOnNew cancels)
5. isProcessingRef = false, setIsSpeaking(false)
```

**Resource Cleanup**:
- Line 199-209: cleanup function revokes URL, clears refs
- Line 64-71 (VoiceProvider unmount): explicit cleanup of audio, URL, Whisper instance

---

### **8. XTTS INTEGRATION**

#### Voice Management:
- Voices stored in `~/.userData/deps/xtts/voices/{voiceId}/`
- Each voice: `reference.wav` + `metadata.json`
- Custom voices via voice cloning (audio sample → XTTS reference)
- Sample voices pre-trained (en, de, es, fr, ja, pt, tr, zh-cn)

#### Synthesis:
- Python server keeps TTS model loaded in memory (VRAM)
- Supports CUDA with CPU fallback on OOM
- Standalone Python 3.12 download (if system Python incompatible)
- Virtual environment: `~/.userData/deps/xtts/venv/`

#### Audio Processing:
- FFmpeg required for duration detection & clip extraction
- Supported formats: mp4, webm, mkv, avi, mov, mp3, wav, ogg, flac, m4a

---

### **9. VOICE CATALOG & DOWNLOADS**

#### Piper Voices:
- Catalog: `https://huggingface.co/rhasspy/piper-voices/resolve/main/voices.json`
- 10-minute cache in memory (voicesCatalogCache)
- Downloads ONNX + config from Hugging Face
- Supports any language in Piper catalog

#### Custom Voice Import:
- Select ONNX model file + config (JSON) pair
- Validates both files exist
- Copy to `~/.userData/deps/piper/custom-voices/`
- Metadata: `custom-voices.json` tracks display names & import timestamps
- Voice key: `custom:{baseName}`

---

### **10. IPC HANDLERS & PRELOAD API**

**Main Process** (src/main/ipc/voice-handlers.ts):
- 59 IPC handlers registered
- All delegate to voiceManager singleton
- Progress callbacks send events to renderer

**Preload API** (src/preload/handlers/voice.ts):
- 51 exposed methods via electronAPI
- Covers: STT, TTS, Piper, XTTS, catalog, custom voices
- Mobile server also exposes `/api/tts/*` endpoints

---

### **11. POTENTIAL BUGS & ISSUES**

#### **Bug 1: Whisper Backend Not Implemented**
- **File**: src/main/voice/whisper-stt.ts, line 74-79
- **Issue**: `transcribe()` always returns error - whisper.cpp binary not integrated
- **Impact**: Server-side STT not available; browser-only fallback
- **Fix Needed**: Integrate whisper.cpp or whisper-cpp-node library

#### **Bug 2: Global speakingProcess Race Condition**
- **File**: src/main/voice/piper-tts.ts, line 15
- **Issue**: Single global `speakingProcess` not guarded for concurrent calls
- **Impact**: If speak() called while another is running, could kill wrong process
- **Fix**: Use promise queue or atomic CAS pattern

#### **Bug 3: Audio Resource Leak in Exception Path**
- **File**: src/renderer/contexts/VoiceContext/ttsHandlers.ts, processQueue()
- **Issue**: If IPC throws exception, audioResolveRef remains set; cleanup skipped
- **Impact**: Promise never resolves; next speak() hangs indefinitely
- **Fix**: Try/finally wrapping the promise or explicit error cleanup

#### **Bug 4: Missing Error Boundary for Whisper Model Load**
- **File**: src/renderer/contexts/VoiceContext/sttHandlers.ts, line 242-244
- **Issue**: Catch block sets error status but doesn't set isModelLoaded = false
- **Impact**: UI shows "loading" forever even after failure
- **Fix**: setIsModelLoaded(false) in error path

#### **Bug 5: XTTS Server Request Ordering**
- **File**: src/main/xtts-server.ts, line 86
- **Issue**: `pendingRequests.entries().next().value` grabs FIRST entry (no request ID matching)
- **Impact**: If 2+ concurrent requests, responses may be delivered to wrong caller
- **Fix**: Include request ID in Python response, match before resolving

#### **Bug 6: Incomplete Silence Detection State Reset**
- **File**: src/renderer/contexts/VoiceContext/sttHandlers.ts, stopRecording()
- **Issue**: Doesn't reset `speechDetectedRef` when stopping; affects next recording
- **Impact**: Next recording may miss silence trigger if first audio chunk is low
- **Fix**: Set speechDetectedRef = false in stopRecording() or startRecording()

#### **Bug 7: TTS Buffer Clearing Logic**
- **File**: src/renderer/components/terminal/useTTS.ts, line 122-124
- **Issue**: Clears buffer if no opening marker, but should check for CLOSING marker too
- **Impact**: Incomplete closing tag causes buffer corruption on next chunk
- **Fix**: Also check `!ttsBufferRef.current.includes('«/tts')`

#### **Bug 8: Settings Type Mismatch in Preload**
- **File**: src/preload/types/voice.ts, line 3
- **Issue**: Declares `ttsEngine?: 'piper' | 'xtts' | 'openvoice'` but codebase only supports 'piper' | 'xtts'
- **Impact**: Type safety issue; 'openvoice' never implemented
- **Fix**: Remove unused variant

#### **Bug 9: Project Voice Settings Not Saved**
- **File**: src/renderer/contexts/VoiceContext/ttsHandlers.ts, line 145-158
- **Issue**: setProjectVoice() only applies settings via IPC, doesn't persist to project config
- **Impact**: Per-project voice choice lost on app restart
- **Fix**: Persist to workspace.json or project settings file

#### **Bug 10: XTTS Python Fallback Only on CUDA Error**
- **File**: src/main/xtts-paths.ts, XTTS_HELPER_SCRIPT line 128-138
- **Issue**: Falls back to CPU only on CUDA OOM; other CUDA errors not handled
- **Impact**: If CUDA has other issues, app crashes instead of falling back
- **Fix**: Catch broader exception types (e.g., any RuntimeError on CUDA)

---

### **12. FILE PATHS & DIRECTORIES**

| Component | Path |
|-----------|------|
| Voice Settings (Global) | `~/.userData/voice-settings.json` |
| Whisper Models | `~/.userData/deps/whisper/models/` |
| Piper Binary | `~/.userData/deps/piper/piper` (or system PATH) |
| Piper Voices | `~/.userData/deps/piper/voices/` |
| Custom Piper Voices | `~/.userData/deps/piper/custom-voices/` |
| XTTS Directory | `~/.userData/deps/xtts/` |
| XTTS Venv | `~/.userData/deps/xtts/venv/` |
| XTTS Standalone Python | `~/.userData/deps/xtts/python/` |
| XTTS Voices | `~/.userData/deps/xtts/voices/` |
| XTTS Helper Script | `~/.userData/deps/xtts/xtts_helper.py` |
| Temp Audio Files | OS temp dir (via electron app.getPath('temp')) |
| TTS Debug Log | `~/.userData/tts-debug.log` |

---

### **13. SUMMARY TABLE**

| Feature | Status | Implementation | Notes |
|---------|--------|-----------------|-------|
| **STT - Whisper** | Partial | Browser: whisper-web-transcriber; Server: model DL only | whisper.cpp integration pending |
| **STT - Silence Detection** | Complete | 2s threshold, frequency analysis | Working, needs reset fix |
| **TTS - Piper** | Complete | Process spawn, stdin/stdout, WAV output | Global process race risk |
| **TTS - XTTS** | Complete | Python server, voice cloning, multilingual | Request ordering bug |
| **Voice Catalog** | Complete | Hugging Face sync, 10min cache | Built-in + downloaded voices |
| **Custom Voices** | Complete | ONNX import, metadata tracking | Per-project override missing |
| **Audio Queue** | Complete | Serial processing, blob URLs | Promise leak in exception path |
| **Settings** | Partial | Global persistent, per-project UI-only | Per-project not saved |

---

All files and their functions are now clearly mapped out with specific bugs noted and fixed recommendations provided.

- **Dynamic Import** (sttHandlers line 5-15):

  }
  ```
- Models downloaded on-demand from HuggingFace URLs (WHISPER_MODEL_URLS constant)
- Models cached in browser IndexedDB by whisper-web-transcriber library
- Auto-confirm prompt via window.confirm override (line 231-238)
- Models: ggml format from ggerganov/whisper.cpp repo

#### Server-Side (Electron):
- Models stored in `~/.userData/deps/whisper/models/`
- Downloaded via `downloadWhisperModel()` in whisper-stt.ts
- Used for backend transcription (when implemented)
- Currently NOT integrated with any transcription binary

---

### **6. SILENCE DETECTION LOGIC**

**In sttHandlers.ts (startAudioMonitoring, lines 84-148)**:

```
1. Create AudioContext + MediaStream from microphone
2. AnalyserNode: FFT size 256, smoothing 0.3
3. Every 100ms:
   - Get frequency data (0-255 scale)
   - Calculate average: sum / 256
   - Normalize to 0-100: (avg / 255) * 100
4. If level < threshold (default 5):
   - Start silence timer on first drop
   - After 2000ms of silence WITH prior speech:
     a. Submit final transcription via callback
     b. Clear buffer & reset flags
     c. stopRecording() → startRecording() to clear Whisper buffer
5. If level >= threshold:
   - Reset silence timer, set speechDetectedRef = true
```

**Guards**:
- `processingUtteranceRef` prevents re-entry during stop/restart
- `speechDetectedRef` ensures audio exceeded threshold at least once (avoids false triggers)
- Final transcription trimmed & length > 1 check

---

### **7. TTS AUDIO QUEUE & PLAYBACK**

**In ttsHandlers.ts (processQueue, lines 161-234)**:

```
1. If already processing or queue empty: skip
2. Set isProcessingRef = true, setIsSpeaking(true)
3. For each queued text:
   a. Call window.electronAPI.voiceSpeak(text) → IPC to main process
   b. Backend returns { success, audioData (base64 WAV) }
   c. Decode base64 → Uint8Array → Blob(audio/wav)
   d. Create object URL
   e. Create <Audio> element, set volume
   f. Wrap in Promise, resolve on audio.onended
   g. On cleanup: revoke URL, remove audio ref
4. Check generation hasn't changed (skipOnNew cancels)
5. isProcessingRef = false, setIsSpeaking(false)
```

**Resource Cleanup**:
- Line 199-209: cleanup function revokes URL, clears refs
- Line 64-71 (VoiceProvider unmount): explicit cleanup of audio, URL, Whisper instance

---

### **8. XTTS INTEGRATION**

- Custom voices via voice cloning (audio sample → XTTS reference)

- Supports CUDA with CPU fallback on OOM

- FFmpeg required for duration detection & clip extraction
- Supported formats: mp4, webm, mkv, avi, mov, mp3, wav, ogg, flac, m4a

### **9. VOICE CATALOG & DOWNLOADS**

- 10-minute cache in memory (voicesCatalogCache)
- Downloads ONNX + config from Hugging Face

- Validates both files exist

- Metadata: `custom-voices.json` tracks display names & import timestamps
- Voice key: `custom:{baseName}`

---

### **10. IPC HANDLERS & PRELOAD API**

**Main Process** (src/main/ipc/voice-handlers.ts):
- 59 IPC handlers registered
- All delegate to voiceManager singleton
- Progress callbacks send events to renderer

**Preload API** (src/preload/handlers/voice.ts):
- 51 exposed methods via electronAPI
- Covers: STT, TTS, Piper, XTTS, catalog, custom voices
- Mobile server also exposes `/api/tts/*` endpoints

---

### **11. POTENTIAL BUGS & ISSUES**

#### **Bug 1: Whisper Backend Not Implemented**
- **File**: src/main/voice/whisper-stt.ts, line 74-79
- **Issue**: `transcribe()` always returns error - whisper.cpp binary not integrated
- **Impact**: Server-side STT not available; browser-only fallback
- **Fix Needed**: Integrate whisper.cpp or whisper-cpp-node library

#### **Bug 2: Global speakingProcess Race Condition**
- **File**: src/main/voice/piper-tts.ts, line 15
- **Issue**: Single global `speakingProcess` not guarded for concurrent calls
- **Impact**: If speak() called while another is running, could kill wrong process
- **Fix**: Use promise queue or atomic CAS pattern

#### **Bug 3: Audio Resource Leak in Exception Path**
- **File**: src/renderer/contexts/VoiceContext/ttsHandlers.ts, processQueue()
- **Issue**: If IPC throws exception, audioResolveRef remains set; cleanup skipped
- **Impact**: Promise never resolves; next speak() hangs indefinitely
- **Fix**: Try/finally wrapping the promise or explicit error cleanup

#### **Bug 4: Missing Error Boundary for Whisper Model Load**
- **File**: src/renderer/contexts/VoiceContext/sttHandlers.ts, line 242-244
- **Issue**: Catch block sets error status but doesn't set isModelLoaded = false
- **Impact**: UI shows "loading" forever even after failure
- **Fix**: setIsModelLoaded(false) in error path

#### **Bug 5: XTTS Server Request Ordering**
- **File**: src/main/xtts-server.ts, line 86
- **Issue**: `pendingRequests.entries().next().value` grabs FIRST entry (no request ID matching)
- **Impact**: If 2+ concurrent requests, responses may be delivered to wrong caller
- **Fix**: Include request ID in Python response, match before resolving

#### **Bug 6: Incomplete Silence Detection State Reset**
- **File**: src/renderer/contexts/VoiceContext/sttHandlers.ts, stopRecording()
- **Issue**: Doesn't reset `speechDetectedRef` when stopping; affects next recording
- **Impact**: Next recording may miss silence trigger if first audio chunk is low
- **Fix**: Set speechDetectedRef = false in stopRecording() or startRecording()

#### **Bug 7: TTS Buffer Clearing Logic**
- **File**: src/renderer/components/terminal/useTTS.ts, line 122-124
- **Issue**: Clears buffer if no opening marker, but should check for CLOSING marker too
- **Impact**: Incomplete closing tag causes buffer corruption on next chunk
- **Fix**: Also check `!ttsBufferRef.current.includes('«/tts')`

#### **Bug 8: Settings Type Mismatch in Preload**
- **File**: src/preload/types/voice.ts, line 3
- **Issue**: Declares `ttsEngine?: 'piper' | 'xtts' | 'openvoice'` but codebase only supports 'piper' | 'xtts'
- **Impact**: Type safety issue; 'openvoice' never implemented
- **Fix**: Remove unused variant

#### **Bug 9: Project Voice Settings Not Saved**
- **File**: src/renderer/contexts/VoiceContext/ttsHandlers.ts, line 145-158
- **Issue**: setProjectVoice() only applies settings via IPC, doesn't persist to project config
- **Impact**: Per-project voice choice lost on app restart
- **Fix**: Persist to workspace.json or project settings file

#### **Bug 10: XTTS Python Fallback Only on CUDA Error**
- **File**: src/main/xtts-paths.ts, XTTS_HELPER_SCRIPT line 128-138
- **Issue**: Falls back to CPU only on CUDA OOM; other CUDA errors not handled
- **Impact**: If CUDA has other issues, app crashes instead of falling back
- **Fix**: Catch broader exception types (e.g., any RuntimeError on CUDA)

---

### **12. FILE PATHS & DIRECTORIES**

| Component | Path |
|-----------|------|
| Voice Settings (Global) | `~/.userData/voice-settings.json` |
| Whisper Models | `~/.userData/deps/whisper/models/` |

| **Audio Queue** | Complete | Serial processing, blob URLs | Promise leak in exception path |

  - Manages XTTS voice cloning (multilingual, custom voices)

  - Manages voice creation, deletion, sample voice downloads

- **/home/user/Programs/Claude Projects/Claude-Terminal/src/main/xtts-server.ts**
  - IPC-based Python subprocess server for XTTS synthesis
  - Maintains persistent connection with pending request map
  - Uses stdin/stdout JSON-RPC communication
  - 300s timeout for synthesis operations
  - Handles process lifecycle and graceful shutdown

---

### **2. STT (SPEECH-TO-TEXT) IMPLEMENTATION**

#### Backend:
- **/home/user/Programs/Claude Projects/Claude-Terminal/src/main/voice/whisper-stt.ts**
  - Whisper model download/installation (tiny.en, base.en, small.en, medium.en, large-v3)
  - Models stored in `~/.userData/deps/whisper/models/`

  - Whisper model downloaded from HuggingFace (ggerganov/whisper.cpp, ggml format)

  - HTML5 Audio playback with blob URLs

  - ANSI stripping: removes `\x1b[[0-9;]*[a-zA-Z]` escape codes (line 240)
  - Newline/whitespace normalization
  - Per-project voice override support (projectVoiceRef vs globalVoiceRef)

#### Terminal-Level TTS:
- **/home/user/Programs/Claude Projects/Claude-Terminal/src/renderer/components/terminal/useTTS.ts**
  - Extracts `«tts»...«/tts»` markers from terminal output
  - Tracks spoken content to avoid repeats (Set limited to 500 items)
  - 2s silent mode before first user input (prevents auto-speaking of session restore)
  - Tracks TTS buffer for incomplete tags (maxed at 50KB)
  - Code pattern detection to skip code blocks

1→import { useCallback, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     2→import type { WhisperModelSize, WhisperInstance, WhisperTranscriberConfig, STTRefs } from './types.js'
     3→import { WHISPER_MODEL_URLS, WHISPER_MODEL_SIZES } from './constants.js'
     4→
     5→// Dynamic import for whisper-web-transcriber - only loaded when voice input is actually used
     6→// This saves ~4.5MB bundle size when voice features are disabled
     7→let WhisperTranscriberClass: (new (config: WhisperTranscriberConfig) => WhisperInstance) | null = null
     8→
     9→async function loadWhisperTranscriber(): Promise<new (config: WhisperTranscriberConfig) => WhisperInstance> {
    10→  if (!WhisperTranscriberClass) {

    12→    WhisperTranscriberClass = module.WhisperTranscriber as new (config: WhisperTranscriberConfig) => WhisperInstance
    13→  }
    14→  return WhisperTranscriberClass
    15→}
    16→
    17→export interface UseSTTHandlersOptions {
    18→  saveVoiceSetting: (key: string, value: boolean | number | string) => void
    19→}
    20→
    21→export interface UseSTTHandlersResult {
    22→  // State
    23→  isRecording: boolean
    24→  isModelLoading: boolean
    25→  isModelLoaded: boolean
    26→  modelLoadProgress: number
    27→  modelLoadStatus: string
    28→  currentTranscription: string
    29→  whisperModel: WhisperModelSize
    30→  audioLevel: number
    31→  silenceThreshold: number
    32→
    33→  // Actions
    34→  setWhisperModel: (model: WhisperModelSize) => void
    35→  setSilenceThreshold: (threshold: number) => void
    36→  startRecording: (onTranscription: (text: string) => void) => Promise<void>
    37→  stopRecording: () => void
    38→
    39→  // Refs for cleanup
    40→  refs: STTRefs
    41→
    42→  // State setters for settings loading
    43→  setWhisperModelState: (model: WhisperModelSize) => void
    44→  setSilenceThresholdState: (threshold: number) => void
    45→}
    46→
    47→export function useSTTHandlers({ saveVoiceSetting }: UseSTTHandlersOptions): UseSTTHandlersResult {
    48→  // Voice Input (STT) state
    49→  const [isRecording, setIsRecording] = useState(false)
    50→  const [isModelLoading, setIsModelLoading] = useState(false)
    51→  const [isModelLoaded, setIsModelLoaded] = useState(false)
    52→  const [modelLoadProgress, setModelLoadProgress] = useState(0)
    53→  const [modelLoadStatus, setModelLoadStatus] = useState('')
    54→  const [whisperModel, setWhisperModelState] = useState<WhisperModelSize>('base.en')
    55→  const [currentTranscription, setCurrentTranscription] = useState('')
    56→  const [audioLevel, setAudioLevel] = useState(0)
    57→  const [silenceThreshold, setSilenceThresholdState] = useState(5)
    58→
    59→  // Refs
    60→  const whisperRef = useRef<WhisperInstance | null>(null)
    61→  const onTranscriptionRef = useRef<((text: string) => void) | null>(null)
    62→  const finalTranscriptionRef = useRef<string>('')
    63→  const silenceTimerRef = useRef<NodeJS.Timeout | null>(null)
    64→  const isRecordingRef = useRef(false)
    65→
    66→  // Audio monitoring refs
    67→  const audioContextRef = useRef<AudioContext | null>(null)
    68→  const analyserRef = useRef<AnalyserNode | null>(null)
    69→  const audioStreamRef = useRef<MediaStream | null>(null)
    70→  const levelIntervalRef = useRef<number | null>(null)
    71→  const silenceStartRef = useRef<number | null>(null)
    72→  const silenceThresholdRef = useRef(silenceThreshold)
    73→  const speechDetectedRef = useRef(false) // true if audio went above threshold since last chunk
    74→  const processingUtteranceRef = useRef(false) // guard against re-entry during stop/submit/restart
    75→
    76→  const refs: STTRefs = {
    77→    whisperRef,
    78→    onTranscriptionRef,

    80→    silenceTimerRef,
    81→    isRecordingRef
    82→  }
    83→
    84→  // Start audio level monitoring
    85→  const startAudioMonitoring = useCallback(async () => {
    86→    try {
    87→      const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ audio: true })
    88→      audioStreamRef.current = stream
    89→      const audioCtx = new AudioContext()
    90→      audioContextRef.current = audioCtx
    91→      const source = audioCtx.createMediaStreamSource(stream)
    92→      const analyser = audioCtx.createAnalyser()
    93→      analyser.fftSize = 256
    94→      analyser.smoothingTimeConstant = 0.3
    95→      source.connect(analyser)
    96→      analyserRef.current = analyser
    97→
    98→      const dataArray = new Uint8Array(analyser.frequencyBinCount)
    99→      levelIntervalRef.current = window.setInterval(() => {

   101→        analyserRef.current.getByteFrequencyData(dataArray)

   124→              silenceStartRef.current = null
   125→              speechDetectedRef.current = false

   136→                  setIsRecording(false)

   138→                })
   139→              }
   140→              processingUtteranceRef.current = false
   141→            }
   142→          }
   143→        } else {
   144→          // Audio is above threshold (speaking)
   145→          silenceStartRef.current = null
   146→          speechDetectedRef.current = true
   147→        }
   148→      }, 100)
   149→    } catch (error) {
   150→      console.error('Failed to start audio monitoring:', error)
   151→    }
   152→  }, [])
   153→
   154→  // Stop audio level monitoring
   155→  const stopAudioMonitoring = useCallback(() => {
   156→    if (levelIntervalRef.current !== null) {
   157→      clearInterval(levelIntervalRef.current)
   158→      levelIntervalRef.current = null
   159→    }
   160→    if (audioContextRef.current) {
   161→      audioContextRef.current.close().catch(() => {})
   162→      audioContextRef.current = null
   163→    }
   164→    if (audioStreamRef.current) {
   165→      audioStreamRef.current.getTracks().forEach(t => t.stop())
   166→      audioStreamRef.current = null
   167→    }
   168→    analyserRef.current = null
   169→    silenceStartRef.current = null
   170→    setAudioLevel(0)
   171→  }, [])
   172→
   173→  // Initialize Whisper transcriber - dynamically loads the module only when needed
   174→  const initWhisper = useCallback(async () => {
   175→    if (whisperRef.current || isModelLoading) return
   176→
   177→    setIsModelLoading(true)
   178→    setModelLoadStatus('Loading Whisper module...')
   179→
   180→    try {
   181→      const WhisperTranscriber = await loadWhisperTranscriber()
   182→
   183→      setModelLoadStatus('Initializing...')
   184→
   185→      const modelUrl = WHISPER_MODEL_URLS[whisperModel]
   186→      const modelSizeMB = WHISPER_MODEL_SIZES[whisperModel]
   187→
   188→      const transcriber = new WhisperTranscriber({
   189→        modelUrl,
   190→        modelSize: whisperModel,
   191→        audioIntervalMs: 3000, // Feed audio to Whisper every 3s for near-realtime processing
   192→        onTranscription: (text: string) => {
   193→          // Library returns CUMULATIVE transcription of all audio since startRecording()
   194→          // So we REPLACE (not append) the current transcription text
   195→          const cleaned = text.trim()
   196→            .replace(/\[BLANK_AUDIO\]/gi, '')
   197→            .replace(/\[Silence\]/gi, '')
   198→            .replace(/\(silence\)/gi, '')
   199→            .replace(/\[Pause\]/gi, '')
   200→            .replace(/\(Pause\)/gi, '')
   201→            .replace(/\[inaudible\]/gi, '')
   202→            .replace(/\[Music\]/gi, '')
   203→            .replace(/\(Music\)/gi, '')
   204→            .replace(/\[Applause\]/gi, '')
   205→            .replace(/\[Laughter\]/gi, '')
   206→            .replace(/\[.*?\]/g, '')
   207→            .replace(/\(.*?\)/g, '')
   208→            .replace(/♪.*?♪/g, '')
   209→            .replace(/\*.*?\*/g, '')
   210→            .replace(/^[\s.,!?]+$/, '')

   214→          // Skip if empty or just short punctuation/artifacts

   216→          if (cleaned && cleaned.length > 1 && !/^[.,!?\-]+$/.test(cleaned) && speechDetectedRef.current) {

   229→      })
   230→
   231→      // Override confirm() to auto-accept the model download prompt from helpers.js
   232→      const originalConfirm = window.confirm

   248→  }, [whisperModel, isModelLoading])
   249→
   250→  // Set Whisper model (saves to settings)
   251→  const setWhisperModel = useCallback((model: WhisperModelSize) => {

   262→  const setSilenceThreshold = useCallback((threshold: number) => {

   272→    onTranscriptionRef.current = onTranscription

   292→    try {

```
     1→import { useCallback, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     2→import type { WhisperModelSize, WhisperInstance, WhisperTranscriberConfig, STTRefs } from './types.js'
     3→import { WHISPER_MODEL_URLS, WHISPER_MODEL_SIZES } from './constants.js'
     4→
     5→// Dynamic import for whisper-web-transcriber - only loaded when voice input is actually used
     6→// This saves ~4.5MB bundle size when voice features are disabled
     7→let WhisperTranscriberClass: (new (config: WhisperTranscriberConfig) => WhisperInstance) | null = null
     8→
     9→async function loadWhisperTranscriber(): Promise<new (config: WhisperTranscriberConfig) => WhisperInstance> {
    10→  if (!WhisperTranscriberClass) {
    11→    const module = await import('whisper-web-transcriber')
    12→    WhisperTranscriberClass = module.WhisperTranscriber as new (config: WhisperTranscriberConfig) => WhisperInstance
    13→  }
    14→  return WhisperTranscriberClass
    15→}
    16→
    17→export interface UseSTTHandlersOptions {
    18→  saveVoiceSetting: (key: string, value: boolean | number | string) => void
    19→}
    20→
    21→export interface UseSTTHandlersResult {
    22→  // State
    23→  isRecording: boolean
    24→  isModelLoading: boolean
    25→  isModelLoaded: boolean
    26→  modelLoadProgress: number
    27→  modelLoadStatus: string
    28→  currentTranscription: string
    29→  whisperModel: WhisperModelSize
    30→  audioLevel: number
    31→  silenceThreshold: number
    32→
    33→  // Actions
    34→  setWhisperModel: (model: WhisperModelSize) => void
    35→  setSilenceThreshold: (threshold: number) => void
    36→  startRecording: (onTranscription: (text: string) => void) => Promise<void>
    37→  stopRecording: () => void
    38→
    39→  // Refs for cleanup
    40→  refs: STTRefs
    41→
    42→  // State setters for settings loading
    43→  setWhisperModelState: (model: WhisperModelSize) => void
    44→  setSilenceThresholdState: (threshold: number) => void
    45→}
    46→
    47→export function useSTTHandlers({ saveVoiceSetting }: UseSTTHandlersOptions): UseSTTHandlersResult {
    48→  // Voice Input (STT) state
    49→  const [isRecording, setIsRecording] = useState(false)
    50→  const [isModelLoading, setIsModelLoading] = useState(false)
    51→  const [isModelLoaded, setIsModelLoaded] = useState(false)
    52→  const [modelLoadProgress, setModelLoadProgress] = useState(0)
    53→  const [modelLoadStatus, setModelLoadStatus] = useState('')
    54→  const [whisperModel, setWhisperModelState] = useState<WhisperModelSize>('base.en')
    55→  const [currentTranscription, setCurrentTranscription] = useState('')
    56→  const [audioLevel, setAudioLevel] = useState(0)
    57→  const [silenceThreshold, setSilenceThresholdState] = useState(5)
    58→
    59→  // Refs
    60→  const whisperRef = useRef<WhisperInstance | null>(null)
    61→  const onTranscriptionRef = useRef<((text: string) => void) | null>(null)
    62→  const finalTranscriptionRef = useRef<string>('')
    63→  const silenceTimerRef = useRef<NodeJS.Timeout | null>(null)
    64→  const isRecordingRef = useRef(false)
    65→
    66→  // Audio monitoring refs
    67→  const audioContextRef = useRef<AudioContext | null>(null)
    68→  const analyserRef = useRef<AnalyserNode | null>(null)
    69→  const audioStreamRef = useRef<MediaStream | null>(null)
    70→  const levelIntervalRef = useRef<number | null>(null)
    71→  const silenceStartRef = useRef<number | null>(null)
    72→  const silenceThresholdRef = useRef(silenceThreshold)
    73→  const speechDetectedRef = useRef(false) // true if audio went above threshold since last chunk
    74→  const processingUtteranceRef = useRef(false) // guard against re-entry during stop/submit/restart
    75→
    76→  const refs: STTRefs = {
    77→    whisperRef,
    78→    onTranscriptionRef,
    79→    finalTranscriptionRef,
    80→    silenceTimerRef,
    81→    isRecordingRef
    82→  }
    83→
    84→  // Start audio level monitoring
    85→  const startAudioMonitoring = useCallback(async () => {
    86→    try {
    87→      const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ audio: true })
    88→      audioStreamRef.current = stream
    89→      const audioCtx = new AudioContext()
    90→      audioContextRef.current = audioCtx
    91→      const source = audioCtx.createMediaStreamSource(stream)
    92→      const analyser = audioCtx.createAnalyser()
    93→      analyser.fftSize = 256
    94→      analyser.smoothingTimeConstant = 0.3
    95→      source.connect(analyser)
    96→      analyserRef.current = analyser
    97→
    98→      const dataArray = new Uint8Array(analyser.frequencyBinCount)
    99→      levelIntervalRef.current = window.setInterval(() => {
   100→        if (!analyserRef.current || !isRecordingRef.current) return
   101→        analyserRef.current.getByteFrequencyData(dataArray)
   102→        const avg = dataArray.reduce((sum, v) => sum + v, 0) / dataArray.length
   103→        const level = Math.round((avg / 255) * 100)
   104→        setAudioLevel(level)
   105→
   106→        const threshold = silenceThresholdRef.current
   107→        if (level < threshold) {
   108→          // Audio is below threshold (silence)
   109→          if (!silenceStartRef.current) {
   110→            silenceStartRef.current = Date.now()
   111→          } else if (!processingUtteranceRef.current) {
   112→            const silenceDuration = Date.now() - silenceStartRef.current
   113→            // After 2s of silence with speech detected: submit transcription,
   114→            // then stop/restart Whisper to clear the audio buffer
   115→            if (silenceDuration > 2000 && speechDetectedRef.current &&
   116→                finalTranscriptionRef.current.trim() &&
   117→                isRecordingRef.current && whisperRef.current) {
   118→              processingUtteranceRef.current = true
   119→
   120→              const callback = onTranscriptionRef.current
   121→              const textToSend = finalTranscriptionRef.current.trim()
   122→              finalTranscriptionRef.current = ''
   123→              setCurrentTranscription('')
   124→              silenceStartRef.current = null
   125→              speechDetectedRef.current = false
   126→
   127→              if (callback && textToSend) {
   128→                callback(textToSend)
   129→              }
   130→
   131→              // Stop and restart to clear Whisper's accumulated audio buffer
   132→              whisperRef.current.stopRecording()
   133→              if (isRecordingRef.current && whisperRef.current) {
   134→                whisperRef.current.startRecording().catch((error) => {
   135→                  console.error('Failed to restart recording after silence:', error)
   136→                  setIsRecording(false)
   137→                  isRecordingRef.current = false
   138→                })
   139→              }
   140→              processingUtteranceRef.current = false
   141→            }
   142→          }
   143→        } else {
   144→          // Audio is above threshold (speaking)
   145→          silenceStartRef.current = null
   146→          speechDetectedRef.current = true
   147→        }
   148→      }, 100)
   149→    } catch (error) {
   150→      console.error('Failed to start audio monitoring:', error)
   151→    }
   152→  }, [])
   153→
   154→  // Stop audio level monitoring
   155→  const stopAudioMonitoring = useCallback(() => {
   156→    if (levelIntervalRef.current !== null) {
   157→      clearInterval(levelIntervalRef.current)
   158→      levelIntervalRef.current = null
   159→    }
   160→    if (audioContextRef.current) {
   161→      audioContextRef.current.close().catch(() => {})
   162→      audioContextRef.current = null
   163→    }
   164→    if (audioStreamRef.current) {
   165→      audioStreamRef.current.getTracks().forEach(t => t.stop())
   166→      audioStreamRef.current = null
   167→    }
   168→    analyserRef.current = null
   169→    silenceStartRef.current = null
   170→    setAudioLevel(0)
   171→  }, [])
   172→
   173→  // Initialize Whisper transcriber - dynamically loads the module only when needed
   174→  const initWhisper = useCallback(async () => {
   175→    if (whisperRef.current || isModelLoading) return
   176→
   177→    setIsModelLoading(true)
   178→    setModelLoadStatus('Loading Whisper module...')
   179→
   180→    try {
   181→      const WhisperTranscriber = await loadWhisperTranscriber()
   182→
   183→      setModelLoadStatus('Initializing...')
   184→
   185→      const modelUrl = WHISPER_MODEL_URLS[whisperModel]
   186→      const modelSizeMB = WHISPER_MODEL_SIZES[whisperModel]
   187→
   188→      const transcriber = new WhisperTranscriber({
   189→        modelUrl,
   190→        modelSize: whisperModel,
   191→        audioIntervalMs: 3000, // Feed audio to Whisper every 3s for near-realtime processing
   192→        onTranscription: (text: string) => {
   193→          // Library returns CUMULATIVE transcription of all audio since startRecording()
   194→          // So we REPLACE (not append) the current transcription text
   195→          const cleaned = text.trim()
   196→            .replace(/\[BLANK_AUDIO\]/gi, '')
   197→            .replace(/\[Silence\]/gi, '')
   198→            .replace(/\(silence\)/gi, '')
   199→            .replace(/\[Pause\]/gi, '')
   200→            .replace(/\(Pause\)/gi, '')
   201→            .replace(/\[inaudible\]/gi, '')
   202→            .replace(/\[Music\]/gi, '')
   203→            .replace(/\(Music\)/gi, '')
   204→            .replace(/\[Applause\]/gi, '')
   205→            .replace(/\[Laughter\]/gi, '')
   206→            .replace(/\[.*?\]/g, '')
   207→            .replace(/\(.*?\)/g, '')
   208→            .replace(/♪.*?♪/g, '')
   209→            .replace(/\*.*?\*/g, '')
   210→            .replace(/^[\s.,!?]+$/, '')
   211→            .replace(/^\.*$/, '')
   212→            .trim()
   213→
   214→          // Skip if empty or just short punctuation/artifacts
   215→          // Also skip if no speech was detected (audio never exceeded threshold)
   216→          if (cleaned && cleaned.length > 1 && !/^[.,!?\-]+$/.test(cleaned) && speechDetectedRef.current) {
   217→            finalTranscriptionRef.current = cleaned
   218→            setCurrentTranscription(cleaned)
   219→          }
   220→        },
   221→        debug: true,
   222→        onProgress: (progress: number) => {
   223→          setModelLoadProgress(progress)
   224→          setModelLoadStatus(`Downloading ${whisperModel} (${modelSizeMB}MB)... ${progress}%`)
   225→        },
   226→        onStatus: (status: string) => {
   227→          setModelLoadStatus(status)
   228→        }
   229→      })
   230→
   231→      // Override confirm() to auto-accept the model download prompt from helpers.js
   232→      const originalConfirm = window.confirm
   233→      window.confirm = () => true
   234→      try {
   235→        await transcriber.loadModel()
   236→      } finally {
   237→        window.confirm = originalConfirm
   238→      }
   239→      whisperRef.current = transcriber
   240→      setIsModelLoaded(true)
   241→      setModelLoadStatus('Model loaded')
   242→    } catch (error: unknown) {
   243→      console.error('Failed to initialize Whisper:', error)
   244→      setModelLoadStatus(`Error: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)}`)
   245→    } finally {
   246→      setIsModelLoading(false)
   247→    }
   248→  }, [whisperModel, isModelLoading])
   249→
   250→  // Set Whisper model (saves to settings)
   251→  const setWhisperModel = useCallback((model: WhisperModelSize) => {
   252→    setWhisperModelState(model)
   253→    if (whisperRef.current) {
   254→      whisperRef.current.destroy()
   255→      whisperRef.current = null
   256→      setIsModelLoaded(false)
   257→    }
   258→    saveVoiceSetting('whisperModel', model)
   259→  }, [saveVoiceSetting])
   260→
   261→  // Set silence threshold (saves to settings)
   262→  const setSilenceThreshold = useCallback((threshold: number) => {
   263→    setSilenceThresholdState(threshold)
   264→    silenceThresholdRef.current = threshold
   265→    saveVoiceSetting('voiceSilenceThreshold', threshold)
   266→  }, [saveVoiceSetting])
   267→
   268→  // Start recording and transcribing
   269→  const startRecording = useCallback(async (onTranscription: (text: string) => void) => {
   270→    if (isRecording) return
   271→
   272→    onTranscriptionRef.current = onTranscription
   273→    finalTranscriptionRef.current = ''
   274→    setCurrentTranscription('')
   275→    silenceStartRef.current = null
   276→    speechDetectedRef.current = false
   277→
   278→    if (silenceTimerRef.current) {
   279→      clearTimeout(silenceTimerRef.current)
   280→      silenceTimerRef.current = null
   281→    }
   282→
   283→    if (!whisperRef.current) {
   284→      await initWhisper()
   285→    }
   286→
   287→    if (!whisperRef.current) {
   288→      console.error('Whisper not initialized')
   289→      return
   290→    }
   291→
   292→    try {
   293→      await whisperRef.current.startRecording()
   294→      await startAudioMonitoring()
   295→      setIsRecording(true)
   296→      isRecordingRef.current = true
   297→    } catch (error: unknown) {
   298→      console.error('Failed to start recording:', error)
   299→      const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : ''
   300→      const errorName = error instanceof Error ? error.name : ''
   301→      if (errorMessage.includes('Permission denied') || errorName === 'NotAllowedError') {
   302→        alert('Microphone access denied. Please allow microphone access in your browser/system settings.')
   303→      }
   304→    }
   305→  }, [isRecording, initWhisper, startAudioMonitoring])
   306→
   307→  // Stop recording
   308→  const stopRecording = useCallback(() => {
   309→    if (!isRecording || !whisperRef.current) return
   310→
   311→    if (silenceTimerRef.current) {
   312→      clearTimeout(silenceTimerRef.current)
   313→      silenceTimerRef.current = null
   314→    }
   315→
   316→    whisperRef.current.stopRecording()
   317→    stopAudioMonitoring()
   318→    setIsRecording(false)
   319→    isRecordingRef.current = false
   320→
   321→    if (onTranscriptionRef.current && finalTranscriptionRef.current.trim()) {
   322→      onTranscriptionRef.current(finalTranscriptionRef.current.trim())
   323→    }
   324→
   325→    onTranscriptionRef.current = null
   326→    finalTranscriptionRef.current = ''
   327→    setCurrentTranscription('')
   328→  }, [isRecording, stopAudioMonitoring])
   329→
   330→  return {
   331→    isRecording,
   332→    isModelLoading,
   333→    isModelLoaded,
   334→    modelLoadProgress,
   335→    modelLoadStatus,
   336→    currentTranscription,
   337→    whisperModel,
   338→    audioLevel,
   339→    silenceThreshold,
   340→    setWhisperModel,
   341→    setSilenceThreshold,
   342→    startRecording,
   343→    stopRecording,
   344→    refs,
   345→    setWhisperModelState,
   346→    setSilenceThresholdState
   347→  }
   348→}
   349→

1→import { useCallback, useMemo, useRef, useEffect, useState } from 'react'
     2→import type { ProjectVoiceSettings, TTSRefs } from './types.js'
     3→
     4→export interface UseTTSHandlersOptions {
     5→  settingsLoaded: boolean
     6→}
     7→
     8→export interface UseTTSHandlersResult {
     9→  // State
    10→  voiceOutputEnabled: boolean
    11→  isSpeaking: boolean
    12→  volume: number
    13→  speed: number
    14→  skipOnNew: boolean
    15→
    16→  // Setters
    17→  setVoiceOutputEnabled: (enabled: boolean) => void
    18→  setVolume: (volume: number) => void
    19→  setSpeed: (speed: number) => void
    20→  setSkipOnNew: (skip: boolean) => void
    21→  setProjectVoice: (settings: ProjectVoiceSettings | null) => void
    22→
    23→  // Actions
    24→  speakText: (text: string) => void
    25→  stopSpeaking: () => void
    26→
    27→  // Refs for external use
    28→  refs: TTSRefs
    29→
    30→  // State setters for settings loading
    31→  setVoiceOutputEnabledState: (enabled: boolean) => void
    32→  setVolumeState: (volume: number) => void
    33→  setSpeedState: (speed: number) => void
    34→  setSkipOnNewState: (skip: boolean) => void
    35→}
    36→
    37→export function useTTSHandlers({ settingsLoaded }: UseTTSHandlersOptions): UseTTSHandlersResult {
    38→  // Voice Output (TTS) state
    39→  const [voiceOutputEnabled, setVoiceOutputEnabledState] = useState(false)
    40→  const [isSpeaking, setIsSpeaking] = useState(false)
    41→  const [volume, setVolumeState] = useState(1.0)
    42→  const [speed, setSpeedState] = useState(1.0)
    43→  const [skipOnNew, setSkipOnNewState] = useState(false)
    44→
    45→  // Refs
    46→  const audioRef = useRef<HTMLAudioElement | null>(null)
    47→  const audioUrlRef = useRef<string | null>(null)
    48→  const speakQueueRef = useRef<string[]>([])
    49→  const isProcessingRef = useRef(false)
    50→  const voiceOutputEnabledRef = useRef(voiceOutputEnabled)
    51→  const skipOnNewRef = useRef(skipOnNew)
    52→  const volumeRef = useRef(volume)
    53→  const processingGenerationRef = useRef(0)
    54→  const audioResolveRef = useRef<(() => void) | null>(null)
    55→  const projectVoiceRef = useRef<ProjectVoiceSettings | null>(null)
    56→  const globalVoiceRef = useRef<{ voice: string; engine: string } | null>(null)
    57→
    58→  const refs: TTSRefs = {
    59→    audioRef,
    60→    audioUrlRef,
    61→    speakQueueRef,
    62→    isProcessingRef,
    63→    voiceOutputEnabledRef,
    64→    skipOnNewRef,
    65→    volumeRef,
    66→    processingGenerationRef,
    67→    audioResolveRef,
    68→    projectVoiceRef,
    69→    globalVoiceRef
    70→  }
    71→
    72→  // Keep refs in sync to avoid stale closures
    73→  useEffect(() => {
    74→    voiceOutputEnabledRef.current = voiceOutputEnabled
    75→  }, [voiceOutputEnabled])
    76→
    77→  useEffect(() => {
    78→    skipOnNewRef.current = skipOnNew
    79→  }, [skipOnNew])
    80→
    81→  useEffect(() => {
    82→    volumeRef.current = volume
    83→  }, [volume])
    84→
    85→  // Save a single voice setting
    86→  const saveVoiceSetting = useCallback(async (key: string, value: boolean | number) => {
    87→    if (!settingsLoaded || !window.electronAPI) return
    88→    const settings = await window.electronAPI?.getSettings()
    89→    await window.electronAPI?.saveSettings({ ...settings, [key]: value })
    90→  }, [settingsLoaded])
    91→
    92→  // Debounced save for slider-based settings (volume, speed) to avoid excessive IPC calls
    93→  const debouncedSaveRef = useRef<{ timer: NodeJS.Timeout | null; pending: Map<string, boolean | number> }>({
    94→    timer: null,
    95→    pending: new Map()
    96→  })
    97→
    98→  const debouncedSaveVoiceSetting = useMemo(() => {
    99→    return (key: string, value: boolean | number) => {
   100→      debouncedSaveRef.current.pending.set(key, value)
   101→      if (debouncedSaveRef.current.timer) {
   102→        clearTimeout(debouncedSaveRef.current.timer)
   103→      }
   104→      debouncedSaveRef.current.timer = setTimeout(() => {
   105→        debouncedSaveRef.current.pending.forEach((val, k) => {
   106→          saveVoiceSetting(k, val)
   107→        })
   108→        debouncedSaveRef.current.pending.clear()
   109→        debouncedSaveRef.current.timer = null
   110→      }, 500)
   111→    }
   112→  }, [saveVoiceSetting])
   113→
   114→  // Wrapper for setVoiceOutputEnabled that saves setting
   115→  const setVoiceOutputEnabled = useCallback((enabled: boolean) => {
   116→    setVoiceOutputEnabledState(enabled)
   117→    saveVoiceSetting('voiceOutputEnabled', enabled)
   118→  }, [saveVoiceSetting])
   119→
   120→  // Update volume on current audio
   121→  const setVolume = useCallback((v: number) => {
   122→    const clamped = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, v))
   123→    setVolumeState(clamped)
   124→    if (audioRef.current) {
   125→      audioRef.current.volume = clamped
   126→    }
   127→    debouncedSaveVoiceSetting('voiceVolume', clamped)
   128→  }, [debouncedSaveVoiceSetting])
   129→
   130→  // Update speed and notify backend
   131→  const setSpeed = useCallback((s: number) => {
   132→    const clamped = Math.max(0.5, Math.min(2.0, s))
   133→    setSpeedState(clamped)
   134→    window.electronAPI?.voiceApplySettings?.({ ttsSpeed: clamped })
   135→    debouncedSaveVoiceSetting('voiceSpeed', clamped)
   136→  }, [debouncedSaveVoiceSetting])
   137→
   138→  // Update skipOnNew and save
   139→  const setSkipOnNew = useCallback((skip: boolean) => {
   140→    setSkipOnNewState(skip)
   141→    saveVoiceSetting('voiceSkipOnNew', skip)
   142→  }, [saveVoiceSetting])
   143→
   144→  // Set per-project voice override
   145→  const setProjectVoice = useCallback((settings: ProjectVoiceSettings | null) => {
   146→    projectVoiceRef.current = settings
   147→    if (settings?.ttsVoice && settings?.ttsEngine) {
   148→      window.electronAPI?.voiceApplySettings?.({
   149→        ttsVoice: settings.ttsVoice,
   150→        ttsEngine: settings.ttsEngine
   151→      })
   152→    } else if (globalVoiceRef.current) {
   153→      window.electronAPI?.voiceApplySettings?.({
   154→        ttsVoice: globalVoiceRef.current.voice,
   155→        ttsEngine: globalVoiceRef.current.engine as 'piper' | 'xtts'
   156→      })
   157→    }
   158→  }, [])
   159→
   160→  // Process the speak queue
   161→  const processQueue = useCallback(async () => {
   162→    if (isProcessingRef.current || speakQueueRef.current.length === 0) return
   163→
   164→    isProcessingRef.current = true
   165→    setIsSpeaking(true)
   166→    const myGeneration = processingGenerationRef.current
   167→
   168→    while (speakQueueRef.current.length > 0) {
   169→      if (processingGenerationRef.current !== myGeneration) {
   170→        return
   171→      }
   172→
   173→      const text = speakQueueRef.current.shift()
   174→      if (!text) continue
   175→
   176→      try {
   177→        if (!window.electronAPI?.voiceSpeak) {
   178→          continue
   179→        }
   180→        const result = await window.electronAPI?.voiceSpeak?.(text)
   181→
   182→        if (processingGenerationRef.current !== myGeneration) {
   183→          return
   184→        }
   185→
   186→        if (result?.success && result.audioData) {
   187→          const base64Audio = result.audioData
   188→          await new Promise<void>((resolve) => {
   189→            audioResolveRef.current = resolve
   190→
   191→            const audioData = Uint8Array.from(atob(base64Audio), c => c.charCodeAt(0))
   192→            const blob = new Blob([audioData], { type: 'audio/wav' })
   193→            const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob)
   194→            const audio = new Audio(url)
   195→            audio.volume = volumeRef.current
   196→            audioRef.current = audio
   197→            audioUrlRef.current = url
   198→
   199→            const cleanup = () => {
   200→              URL.revokeObjectURL(url)
   201→              if (audioRef.current === audio) {
   202→                audioRef.current = null
   203→              }
   204→              if (audioUrlRef.current === url) {
   205→                audioUrlRef.current = null
   206→              }
   207→              audioResolveRef.current = null
   208→              resolve()
   209→            }
   210→
   211→            audio.onended = cleanup
   212→            audio.onerror = (e) => {
   213→              console.error('Audio playback error:', e)
   214→              cleanup()
   215→            }
   216→
   217→            audio.play().catch(e => {
   218→              console.error('Failed to play audio:', e)
   219→              cleanup()
   220→            })
   221→          })
   222→        } else if (result?.error) {
   223→          console.error('TTS error:', result.error)
   224→        }
   225→      } catch (e) {
   226→        console.error('TTS error:', e)
   227→      }
   228→    }
   229→
   230→    if (processingGenerationRef.current === myGeneration) {
   231→      isProcessingRef.current = false
   232→      setIsSpeaking(false)
   233→    }
   234→  }, [])
   235→
   236→  const speakText = useCallback((text: string) => {
   237→    if (!voiceOutputEnabledRef.current) return
   238→
   239→    const cleanText = text
   240→      .replace(/\x1b\[[0-9;]*[a-zA-Z]/g, '')
   241→      .replace(/[\r\n]+/g, ' ')
   242→      .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
   243→      .trim()
   244→
   245→    console.log('[TTS Debug] speakText called:', {
   246→      originalLength: text.length,
   247→      cleanedLength: cleanText.length,
   248→      original: text.substring(0, 100),
   249→      cleaned: cleanText.substring(0, 100)
   250→    })
   251→
   252→    if (cleanText.length < 3) return
   253→
   254→    if (skipOnNewRef.current) {
   255→      speakQueueRef.current = []
   256→      processingGenerationRef.current++
   257→      if (audioResolveRef.current) {
   258→        audioResolveRef.current()
   259→        audioResolveRef.current = null
   260→      }
   261→      if (audioRef.current) {
   262→        audioRef.current.pause()
   263→        audioRef.current = null
   264→      }
   265→      isProcessingRef.current = false
   266→    }
   267→
   268→    speakQueueRef.current.push(cleanText)
   269→    processQueue()
   270→  }, [processQueue])
   271→
   272→  const stopSpeaking = useCallback(() => {
   273→    speakQueueRef.current = []
   274→    processingGenerationRef.current++
   275→    if (audioResolveRef.current) {
   276→      audioResolveRef.current()
   277→      audioResolveRef.current = null
   278→    }
   279→    if (audioRef.current) {
   280→      audioRef.current.pause()
   281→      audioRef.current = null
   282→    }
   283→    window.electronAPI?.voiceStopSpeaking?.()
   284→    setIsSpeaking(false)
   285→    isProcessingRef.current = false
   286→  }, [])
   287→
   288→  // Stop speaking when disabled
   289→  useEffect(() => {
   290→    if (!voiceOutputEnabled) {
   291→      stopSpeaking()
   292→    }
   293→  }, [voiceOutputEnabled, stopSpeaking])
   294→
   295→  return {
   296→    voiceOutputEnabled,
   297→    isSpeaking,
   298→    volume,
   299→    speed,
   300→    skipOnNew,
   301→    setVoiceOutputEnabled,
   302→    setVolume,
   303→    setSpeed,
   304→    setSkipOnNew,
   305→    setProjectVoice,
   306→    speakText,
   307→    stopSpeaking,
   308→    refs,
   309→    setVoiceOutputEnabledState,
   310→    setVolumeState,
   311→    setSpeedState,
   312→    setSkipOnNewState
   313→  }
   314→}
   315→
